blocks.name: Cup And Handle
blocks.description: Cup and Handle - Bullish continuation pattern with rounded accumulation base and brief consolidation handle. Fires on breakout above handle resistance. High-confidence bullish setup for trending markets.

signals.name: BREAKOUT_CONFIRMED
signals.description: Cup & Handle breakout - Rim resistance broken with volume. Enter longs aggressively. Target = cup depth projection. Stop below handle. 65% success rate.

signals.name: CUP_FORMING
signals.description: Cup forming - Rounded bottom recovery >60% complete. Bullish continuation developing. Wait for handle formation. Prepare long entry on breakout.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Cup & Handle forming - Early pattern structure. Cup depth confirmed. Waiting for recovery and handle. Monitor for completion.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No Cup & Handle - Pattern conditions not met. Insufficient cup depth or recovery. Cup & Handle patterns are rare. Wait for formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish Cup & Handle - Pattern forming or broken out. Long positions favorable. Bullish continuation pattern. Use cup depth for targets.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: No bearish signal - Cup & Handle is a bullish-only pattern. This signal never fires.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No Cup & Handle pattern - Market not forming bullish continuation. Wait for cup formation and breakout before entering longs.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect Cup & Handle pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 40 candles for Cup & Handle detection. Wait for more price history to form pattern.

blocks.name: Inverse Head And Shoulders
blocks.description: Inverse Head and Shoulders - Bullish reversal pattern with three troughs (two higher shoulders flanking a deeper head). Neckline break confirms reversal from downtrend. Use to enter longs on confirmed breakouts.

signals.name: PATTERN_CONFIRMED
signals.description: Inverse H&S confirmed - Neckline broken. Enter longs aggressively. Target = pattern height above neckline. Stop below right shoulder. 86% success rate.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Inverse H&S forming - Three troughs detected (left shoulder, head, right shoulder). Bullish reversal pattern. Wait for neckline break. Prepare long entry.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No Inverse H&S - Pattern conditions not met. Need three troughs with head lower than shoulders. Wait for pattern formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish Inverse H&S pattern - Classic bottoming pattern detected. Long positions favorable. Major trend reversal signal. Use measured move for targets.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish (inverse scenario) - Rare for Inverse H&S. Pattern typically bullish. Verify if standard H&S pattern instead.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No Inverse H&S pattern - Market not forming bullish reversal. Wait for three-trough formation with neckline before trading.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect Inverse H&S pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 40 candles for Inverse H&S detection. Wait for more price history to form three-trough pattern.

blocks.name: Falling Wedge
blocks.description: Falling Wedge - Bullish reversal/continuation pattern with converging declining trendlines. Despite downward slope, bullish breakout is expected as selling pressure decreases. Use in oversold markets or corrections.

signals.name: BULLISH_BREAKOUT
signals.description: Falling wedge breakout - Resistance broken with compression release. Enter longs aggressively. Bullish reversal confirmed. Target = wedge height projection.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Falling wedge forming - Converging falling highs and lows. Bullish reversal pattern. Wait for upside breakout. Volume declining into apex.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No falling wedge - Pattern conditions not met. No converging falling trendlines detected. Wait for pattern formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish falling wedge - Pattern forming or broken out. Long positions favorable. Classic bullish reversal. 68% success rate.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Not applicable - Falling wedge is bullish reversal only. Never emits BEARISH. Marked for system compatibility.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No falling wedge pattern - Market not forming bullish reversal. Wait for converging falling wedge before entering longs.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect falling wedge pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 50 candles for falling wedge detection. Wait for more price history to form pattern.

blocks.name: Descending Triangle
blocks.description: Descending Triangle - Bearish continuation pattern with flat support and falling resistance. Detects breakdown below horizontal support with declining highs. Signals bearish pressure building.

signals.name: BEARISH_BREAKDOWN
signals.description: Descending triangle breakdown - Support broken with volume. Enter shorts aggressively. Target = pattern height. Stop above resistance line. 68% success rate.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Descending triangle forming - Falling highs + flat support. Bearish continuation pattern. Wait for breakdown below support. Prepare short entry.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No descending triangle - Pattern conditions not met. No falling highs or flat support detected. Wait for pattern formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: No bullish signal - Descending Triangle is a bearish-only pattern. This signal never fires.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish triangle pattern - Descending triangle detected or broken down. Short positions favorable. Use support breakdown for entry.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No triangle pattern - Market structure unclear. No descending triangle setup. Wait for pattern formation before trading.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 50 candles for descending triangle detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Rising Wedge
blocks.description: Rising Wedge - Bearish reversal/continuation pattern with converging rising trendlines. Despite upward slope, bearish breakdown is expected as buying pressure weakens. Use to anticipate reversal from extended uptrends.

signals.name: BEARISH_BREAKDOWN
signals.description: Rising wedge breakdown - Support broken with compression release. Enter shorts aggressively. Bearish reversal confirmed. Target = wedge height projected down. 70% success rate.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Rising wedge forming - Converging rising highs and lows. Bearish reversal pattern. Wait for downside breakdown. Volume declining into apex.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No rising wedge - Pattern conditions not met. No converging rising trendlines detected. Wait for pattern formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish (rare scenario) - Rising wedge typically bearish. Verify pattern structure. Most rising wedges break downward.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish rising wedge - Pattern forming or broken down. Short positions favorable. Classic bearish reversal. 70% success rate.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No rising wedge pattern - Market not forming bearish reversal. Wait for converging rising wedge before entering shorts.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect rising wedge pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 50 candles for rising wedge detection. Wait for more price history to form pattern.

blocks.name: Triple Top
blocks.description: Triple Top - Strong bearish reversal with three roughly equal highs, indicating persistent seller supply at resistance. More powerful than double top. Use for high-conviction short entries in overbought conditions.

signals.name: BEARISH_BREAKDOWN
signals.description: Triple top breakdown - Neckline broken. Enter shorts aggressively. Three tests of resistance confirmed. Target = pattern height below neckline. 70%+ success rate.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Triple top forming - Three similar peaks detected. Bearish reversal pattern. Wait for neckline break. Multiple resistance tests strengthen pattern.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No triple top - Pattern conditions not met. Need exactly 3 similar peaks with proper spacing. Wait for pattern formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Not applicable - Triple top is bearish pattern only

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish triple top - Classic topping pattern. Short positions favorable. Strong resistance confirmed by triple test. Major reversal signal.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No triple top - Market not forming bearish reversal. Wait for three similar peaks with neckline before trading.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect triple top pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 40 candles for triple top detection. Wait for more price history to form three-peak pattern.

blocks.name: Initial Balance Breakout
blocks.description: Initial Balance Breakout - Detects price breaking above or below the first-hour trading range (IB). Breakouts from the initial balance often set the day direction. Ideal for intraday momentum and session strategies.

signals.name: BULLISH_BREAKOUT
signals.description: Initial Balance bullish breakout - Price broke above IB high. Enter longs on continuation. Target = IB range extensions (25%, 50%, 100%). Volume confirmation ideal.

signals.name: BEARISH_BREAKOUT
signals.description: Initial Balance bearish breakout - Price broke below IB low. Enter shorts on continuation. Target = IB range extensions downward. Volume confirmation ideal.

signals.name: ABOVE_IB
signals.description: Above Initial Balance - Price continuing above IB high. Bullish momentum. Hold longs or add on pullbacks to IB high (support).

signals.name: BELOW_IB
signals.description: Below Initial Balance - Price continuing below IB low. Bearish momentum. Hold shorts or add on rallies to IB low (resistance).

signals.name: INSIDE_IB
signals.description: Inside Initial Balance - Price consolidating within IB range. No clear bias. Wait for breakout above IB high or breakdown below IB low.

signals.name: LOWER_IB
signals.description: Lower Initial Balance zone - Price in bottom 30% of IB range. Bearish bias. Watch for breakdown below IB low. Prepare for short entry.

signals.name: IB_FORMED
signals.description: Initial Balance formed - 2-hour IB range established. Track IB high and low. Wait for price to approach edges for breakout setups.

signals.name: NO_IB
signals.description: No Initial Balance - IB session hasn't completed yet. Wait for IB period to finish before trading IB breakouts.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish Initial Balance setup - Above IB or bullish breakout. Long positions favorable. Use IB high as support, target range extensions.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish Initial Balance setup - Below IB or bearish breakout. Short positions favorable. Use IB low as resistance, target range extensions down.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Inside Initial Balance - Price consolidating within IB range. No directional bias. Wait for breakout above high or below low before trading.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect Initial Balance. Check data quality and timestamp requirements.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 20 candles for IB detection. Wait for more price history to form IB session.

blocks.name: Double Bottom
blocks.description: Double Bottom - Classic bullish reversal pattern with two equal lows and neckline breakout. Detects price forming a W-shape, signaling exhaustion of sellers. Use to confirm trend reversals from downtrends.

signals.name: BULLISH_BREAKOUT
signals.description: Double bottom breakout - Neckline resistance broken. Enter longs aggressively. Target = neckline to trough distance projected up. Stop below second trough.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Double bottom forming - Two equal lows detected. Bullish reversal pattern. Wait for neckline breakout. Prepare long entry on confirmation.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No double bottom - Pattern conditions not met. Need two similar troughs with proper spacing. Wait for pattern formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish double bottom - Pattern forming or broken out. Long positions favorable. Classic reversal pattern. Use measured move for targets.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: No bearish signal - Double Bottom is a bullish-only pattern. This signal never fires.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No double bottom pattern - Market not forming bullish reversal. Wait for two equal lows and neckline break before entering.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect double bottom pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 30 candles for double bottom detection. Wait for more price history to form pattern.

blocks.name: Flag Pattern
blocks.description: Flag Pattern - Short consolidation pullback against a strong trend, followed by continuation in trend direction. Bullish flags form after strong up moves; bearish flags after strong down moves. High win-rate momentum continuation.

signals.name: BEARISH_BREAKOUT
signals.description: Bearish flag breakout - Lower channel broken after consolidation. Enter shorts aggressively. Target = flagpole height projected down. 68% success rate.

signals.name: BULLISH_BREAKOUT
signals.description: Bullish flag breakout - Upper channel broken after consolidation. Enter longs aggressively. Target = flagpole height projected up. 68% success rate.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Flag forming - Strong move (flagpole) followed by tight consolidation (flag). Continuation pattern. Wait for breakout. Declining volume typical.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No flag pattern - Missing strong directional move or consolidation channel. Wait for flagpole and flag formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish flag pattern - Upward flagpole with consolidation. Long positions favorable. Bullish continuation expected. Use flagpole height for targets.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish flag pattern - Downward flagpole with consolidation. Short positions favorable. Bearish continuation expected. Use flagpole height for targets.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No flag pattern - Market not forming continuation pattern. Wait for strong move followed by consolidation before trading.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect flag pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 50 candles for flag pattern detection. Wait for more price history to form pattern.

blocks.name: Triple Bottom
blocks.description: Triple Bottom - Strong bullish reversal with three roughly equal lows, indicating persistent buyer demand at support. More powerful than double bottom. Use for high-conviction reversal entries in oversold conditions.

signals.name: BULLISH_BREAKOUT
signals.description: Triple bottom breakout - Neckline broken. Enter longs aggressively. Three tests of support confirmed. Target = pattern height above neckline. 70%+ success rate.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Triple bottom forming - Three similar troughs detected. Bullish reversal pattern. Wait for neckline break. Multiple support tests strengthen pattern.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No triple bottom - Pattern conditions not met. Need exactly 3 similar troughs with proper spacing. Wait for pattern formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish triple bottom - Classic bottoming pattern. Long positions favorable. Strong support confirmed by triple test. Major reversal signal.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Not applicable - Triple bottom is bullish pattern only

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No triple bottom - Market not forming bullish reversal. Wait for three similar troughs with neckline before trading.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect triple bottom pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 40 candles for triple bottom detection. Wait for more price history to form three-trough pattern.

blocks.name: Swing Breakout Sequence
blocks.description: Swing Breakout Sequence - Detects a series of higher highs/lower lows with successive breakouts forming a trend sequence. Confirms trending market structure with momentum. Directionally neutral based on breakout direction.

signals.name: BEARISH_BREAKOUT_SEQUENCE
signals.description: Bearish 5-point sequence confirmed - Two failed breakdowns + liquidity trap (Point 4) + reversal pattern (Point 5). Enter shorts. 70-78% win rate.

signals.name: BULLISH_BREAKOUT_SEQUENCE
signals.description: Bullish 5-point sequence confirmed - Two failed breakouts + liquidity trap (Point 4) + reversal pattern (Point 5). Enter longs. 70-78% win rate.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish swing breakout - 5-point sequence from swing low. Long positions favorable. Wait for Point 5 reversal pattern before entry.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish swing breakout - 5-point sequence from swing high. Short positions favorable. Wait for Point 5 reversal pattern before entry.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No swing breakout sequence - Pattern incomplete. Need 5 points: initial breakout, pullback, second breakout, liquidity trap, reversal pattern.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect swing breakout sequence. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 100 candles for swing breakout sequence detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Candle 2 Close
blocks.description: Candle 2 Close - Detects two-candle confirmation sequences (engulfing, inside bar, pin bar setups). Directionally neutral signal used to confirm breakouts or reversals. Suited for entry timing after initial signal.

signals.name: BULLISH_C2_CLOSE
signals.description: Bullish C2 Close - Failed downside breakout with bullish reversal. Enter longs at C2 zone. Stop below C2 low. Target C3 expansion high.

signals.name: BEARISH_C2_CLOSE
signals.description: Bearish C2 Close - Failed upside breakout with bearish reversal. Enter shorts at C2 zone. Stop above C2 high. Target C3 expansion low.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish C2 pattern - Failed breakdown with reversal. Long positions favorable. Use C2 equilibrium zone for entry. Stop below pattern.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish C2 pattern - Failed breakout with reversal. Short positions favorable. Use C2 equilibrium zone for entry. Stop above pattern.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No C2 Close pattern - Failed breakout conditions not met. No reversal signal. Wait for 4-candle pattern formation.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect Candle 2 Close pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 4 candles for C2 Close pattern detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Ascending Triangle
blocks.description: Ascending Triangle - Bullish continuation pattern with flat resistance and rising support. Detects breakout above horizontal resistance with rising lows. Ideal for trending markets with momentum confirmation.

signals.name: BULLISH_BREAKOUT
signals.description: Ascending triangle breakout - Resistance broken with volume. Enter longs aggressively. Target = pattern height. Stop below support line. 72% success rate.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Ascending triangle forming - Rising lows + flat resistance. Bullish continuation pattern. Wait for breakout above resistance. Prepare long entry.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No ascending triangle - Pattern conditions not met. No rising lows or flat resistance detected. Wait for pattern formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish triangle pattern - Ascending triangle detected or broken out. Long positions favorable. Use resistance breakout for entry.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish triangle (rare) - Unexpected breakdown from ascending triangle. Exit longs immediately. Consider short with tight stop.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No triangle pattern - Market structure unclear. No ascending triangle setup. Wait for pattern formation before trading.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 15 candles for ascending triangle detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Head And Shoulders
blocks.description: Head and Shoulders - Classic bearish reversal pattern with three peaks (two lower shoulders flanking a head). Neckline break confirms reversal from uptrend. Use to enter shorts on confirmed breakdowns.

signals.name: PATTERN_CONFIRMED
signals.description: Head & Shoulders confirmed - Neckline broken. Enter shorts aggressively. Target = pattern height below neckline. Stop above right shoulder. 75-82% success rate.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Head & Shoulders forming - Three peaks detected (left shoulder, head, right shoulder). Bearish reversal pattern. Wait for neckline break. Prepare short entry.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No Head & Shoulders - Pattern conditions not met. Need three peaks with head higher than shoulders. Wait for pattern formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish (inverse scenario) - Rare for standard H&S. Pattern typically bearish. Verify if inverse H&S pattern instead.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish H&S pattern - Classic topping pattern detected. Short positions favorable. Major trend reversal signal. Use measured move for targets.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No Head & Shoulders pattern - Market not forming bearish reversal. Wait for three-peak formation with neckline before trading.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect Head & Shoulders pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 40 candles for H&S detection. Wait for more price history to form three-peak pattern.

blocks.name: Rounding Bottom
blocks.description: Rounding Bottom - Bullish reversal pattern with a slow, gradual curve from downtrend to uptrend (saucer shape). Signals long-term accumulation and sentiment shift. Best for longer timeframe trend-reversal strategies.

signals.name: BREAKOUT_CONFIRMED
signals.description: Rounding bottom breakout - U-shaped recovery complete. Enter longs aggressively. Bullish reversal confirmed. Target = half pattern depth projected up. 63% success rate.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Rounding bottom forming - Smooth U-shaped bottom detected. Bullish saucer pattern. Price recovering from lows. Wait for breakout. Volume increasing.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No rounding bottom - Pattern conditions not met. No smooth U-shaped recovery detected. Wait for saucer pattern formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish rounding bottom - Saucer pattern forming or broken out. Long positions favorable. Classic bullish reversal. Gradual accumulation pattern.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish (inverse scenario) - Rounding bottom typically bullish. Verify pattern structure. Pattern indicates accumulation.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No rounding bottom - Market not forming bullish saucer. Wait for smooth U-shaped recovery before entering longs.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect rounding bottom pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 40 candles for rounding bottom detection. Wait for more price history to form U-shaped pattern.

blocks.name: Internal Pivot Pattern
blocks.description: Internal Pivot Pattern - Identifies internal swing highs/lows within larger structures as key reversal or continuation pivots. Used for precise entry timing at local turning points. Suitable for both directions.

signals.name: BEARISH_PIVOT_HIGH
signals.description: Bearish pivot high detected - Price made swing high with lower highs before and after. Bearish reversal signal. Enter shorts. Use pivot high as stop.

signals.name: BULLISH_PIVOT_LOW
signals.description: Bullish pivot low detected - Price made swing low with higher lows before and after. Bullish reversal signal. Enter longs. Use pivot low as stop.

signals.name: PIVOT_HIGH
signals.description: Pivot high formed - Swing high confirmed. Bearish reversal potential. Wait for price confirmation before entering shorts. Monitor for breakout.

signals.name: PIVOT_LOW
signals.description: Pivot low formed - Swing low confirmed. Bullish reversal potential. Wait for price confirmation before entering longs. Monitor for breakdown.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish pivot detected - Swing low reversal identified. Long positions favorable. 70-80% faster detection than traditional pivots. Use pivot as support.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish pivot detected - Swing high reversal identified. Short positions favorable. Early reversal signal. Use pivot as resistance.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No pivot detected - Market not forming clear swing high or low. Wait for pivot confirmation before trading reversals.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect internal pivot pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need sufficient bars for pivot detection. Wait for more price history to identify swing points.

blocks.name: Pennant Pattern
blocks.description: Pennant Pattern - Brief symmetrical consolidation after a sharp price move, followed by continuation in the original trend direction. Similar to flag but with converging trendlines. Short-duration momentum continuation.

signals.name: BEARISH_BREAKOUT
signals.description: Bearish pennant breakout - Lower triangle broken after consolidation. Enter shorts aggressively. Target = pole height projected down. 65% success rate.

signals.name: BULLISH_BREAKOUT
signals.description: Bullish pennant breakout - Upper triangle broken after consolidation. Enter longs aggressively. Target = pole height projected up. 65% success rate.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Pennant forming - Strong move (pole) followed by converging triangle. Continuation pattern. Wait for breakout. Volume declining typical.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No pennant pattern - Missing strong directional move or converging triangle. Wait for pole and pennant formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish pennant pattern - Upward pole with converging consolidation. Long positions favorable. Bullish continuation expected. Use pole height for targets.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish pennant pattern - Downward pole with converging consolidation. Short positions favorable. Bearish continuation expected. Use pole height for targets.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No pennant pattern - Market not forming continuation pattern. Wait for strong move followed by converging triangle before trading.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect pennant pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 50 candles for pennant detection. Wait for more price history to form pattern.

blocks.name: Symmetrical Triangle
blocks.description: Symmetrical Triangle - Consolidation pattern with converging trendlines, neutral bias until breakout direction is confirmed. Equal probability of bullish or bearish breakout. Use to anticipate and trade the eventual move.

signals.name: BEARISH_BREAKOUT
signals.description: Symmetrical triangle bearish breakout - Lower bound broken. Enter shorts on continuation. Bilateral pattern resolving bearish. 60% base success rate.

signals.name: BULLISH_BREAKOUT
signals.description: Symmetrical triangle bullish breakout - Upper bound broken. Enter longs on continuation. Bilateral pattern resolving bullish. 60% base success rate.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Symmetrical triangle forming - Converging support and resistance. Bilateral pattern. No directional bias yet. Wait for breakout. Volume declining typical.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No symmetrical triangle - Pattern conditions not met. No converging bilateral trendlines detected. Wait for pattern formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish symmetrical triangle breakout - Pattern resolving upward. Long positions favorable. Exit = triangle height projected up from breakout.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish symmetrical triangle breakout - Pattern resolving downward. Short positions favorable. Target = triangle height projected down from breakout.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Symmetrical triangle forming - No breakout yet. Bilateral consolidation pattern. Equal probability up or down. Wait for directional break before trading.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect symmetrical triangle pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 50 candles for symmetrical triangle detection. Wait for more price history to form pattern.

blocks.name: Three Bar Reversal
blocks.description: Three Bar Reversal - Detects a three-candle reversal sequence (bullish or bearish). Strong directional reversal signal with well-defined risk/reward. Applicable to both tops and bottoms for entry timing.

signals.name: BULLISH_3BAR
signals.description: Bullish 3-bar reversal - Bar 3 made new low but closed higher. Bullish reversal confirmed. Enter longs. Stop below Bar 3 low.

signals.name: BEARISH_3BAR
signals.description: Bearish 3-bar reversal - Bar 3 made new high but closed lower. Bearish reversal confirmed. Enter shorts. Stop above Bar 3 high.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish 3-bar pattern - Short-term reversal signal to upside. Long positions favorable. Quick reversal pattern (3 candles).

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish 3-bar pattern - Short-term reversal signal to downside. Short positions favorable. Quick reversal pattern (3 candles).

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No 3-bar reversal - Pattern conditions not met. Need 3 candles with trend continuation then reversal close.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect 3-bar reversal. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least minimum bars for 3-bar reversal detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Double Top
blocks.description: Double Top - Bearish reversal pattern detecting two equal highs followed by neckline breakdown. Price sweeps prior high but fails to hold, confirming seller dominance. Use to enter shorts at reversal zones.

signals.name: BEARISH_BREAKDOWN
signals.description: Double top breakdown - Neckline support broken. Enter shorts aggressively. Target = neckline to peak distance projected down. Stop above second peak.

signals.name: PATTERN_FORMING
signals.description: Double top forming - Two equal highs detected. Bearish reversal pattern. Wait for neckline breakdown. Prepare short entry on confirmation.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No double top - Pattern conditions not met. Need two similar peaks with proper spacing. Wait for pattern formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: No bullish signal - Double Top is a bearish-only pattern. This signal never fires.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish double top - Pattern forming or broken down. Short positions favorable. Classic reversal pattern. Use measured move for targets.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No double top pattern - Market not forming bearish reversal. Wait for two equal highs and neckline break before entering shorts.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect double top pattern. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 30 candles for double top detection. Wait for more price history to form pattern.

blocks.name: Rsi Divergence
blocks.description: RSI Divergence - Detects bullish and bearish divergence between price action and RSI momentum. Bullish divergence (lower price, higher RSI) signals potential reversal up; bearish the opposite. High-accuracy reversal confirmation signal.

signals.name: BEARISH_DIVERGENCE
signals.description: Bearish divergence - Price making higher highs but RSI making lower highs. Reversal imminent. Take profit on longs, enter shorts.

signals.name: BULLISH_DIVERGENCE
signals.description: Bullish divergence - Price making lower lows but RSI making higher lows. Reversal imminent. Take profit on shorts, enter longs.

signals.name: OVERBOUGHT
signals.description: RSI overbought (>75) - Uptrend exhausting. Consider taking profit on longs. Short entry favorable. Wait for confirmation.

signals.name: OVERSOLD
signals.description: RSI oversold (<25) - Downtrend exhausting. Consider taking profit on shorts. Long entry favorable. Wait for confirmation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish RSI signal - Oversold or bullish divergence detected. Long positions favorable. Reversal or bounce expected.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish RSI signal - Overbought or bearish divergence detected. Short positions favorable. Reversal or pullback expected.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: RSI neutral (25-75) - No extreme momentum condition. Market in equilibrium. Wait for overbought/oversold or divergence.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate RSI. Check data quality and minimum period requirements.

blocks.name: Macd Signal
blocks.description: MACD Signal - Moving Average Convergence Divergence crossover detector with divergence detection

signals.name: BULLISH_DIVERGENCE
signals.description: Bullish divergence - price lower low, MACD higher low (reversal signal)

signals.name: BEARISH_DIVERGENCE
signals.description: Bearish divergence - price higher high, MACD lower high (reversal signal)

signals.name: BULLISH_ZERO_CROSS
signals.description: MACD crossed above zero - bullish trend confirmation

signals.name: BEARISH_ZERO_CROSS
signals.description: MACD crossed below zero - bearish trend confirmation

signals.name: BULLISH_CROSS
signals.description: MACD crossed above signal line - bullish momentum

signals.name: BEARISH_CROSS
signals.description: MACD crossed below signal line - bearish momentum

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish MACD signal - any bullish event (simple)

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish MACD signal - any bearish event (simple)

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No MACD signal - holding position

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error occurred

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Not enough data for analysis

blocks.name: Stochastic Rsi
blocks.description: Stochastic RSI - Applies stochastic formula to RSI values for more sensitive overbought/oversold detection. Fires faster than standard RSI. Neutral indicator used to time entries within larger trend context.

signals.name: BEARISH_CROSS
signals.description: Bearish cross - %K crossed below %D signal line. Momentum turning down. Enter shorts or take profit on longs. Best in overbought zone.

signals.name: BULLISH_CROSS
signals.description: Bullish cross - %K crossed above %D signal line. Momentum turning up. Enter longs or take profit on shorts. Best in oversold zone.

signals.name: NEUTRAL_HIGH
signals.description: Overbought zone (>60) - No cross yet. Uptrend exhausting. Watch for bearish cross. Tighten stops on longs, prepare shorts.

signals.name: NEUTRAL_LOW
signals.description: Oversold zone (<40) - No cross yet. Downtrend exhausting. Watch for bullish cross. Tighten stops on shorts, prepare longs.

signals.name: NO_CROSS
signals.description: No cross detected - Stochastic RSI in neutral zone. No extreme momentum. Wait for overbought/oversold or crossover.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish Stochastic RSI - Bullish cross or oversold. Long positions favorable. Use %K/%D for entry timing.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish Stochastic RSI - Bearish cross or overbought. Short positions favorable. Use %K/%D for entry timing.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral Stochastic RSI - No extreme momentum or cross. Market in equilibrium. Wait for extreme levels or crossover.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate Stochastic RSI. Check data quality and parameter configuration.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 30 candles for Stochastic RSI calculation. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Hod
blocks.description: HOD (High of Day) - Tracks the highest price reached during the current trading day. Key resistance level and breakout target. Neutral reference; bullish breakout or bearish rejection depending on context.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish HOD - Price rejected from or below yesterday's high. Short positions favorable. Resistance holding.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish HOD - Price broke above yesterday's high. Long positions favorable. Breakout confirmed. New highs forming.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral HOD - Price near yesterday's high equilibrium. Wait for breakout or rejection confirmation.

signals.name: HOD_REJECTION
signals.description: HOD rejection - Price rejected from yesterday's high. Confirmed reversal pattern. Enter shorts. Resistance confirmed.

signals.name: AT_HOD
signals.description: At HOD - Price testing yesterday's high. Key decision level. Watch for breakout or rejection. High probability setup.

signals.name: BELOW_HOD
signals.description: Below HOD - Price below yesterday's high. HOD acting as resistance. Wait for breakout or support bounces.

signals.name: ABOVE_HOD
signals.description: Above HOD - Price broke above yesterday's high. Bullish breakthrough confirmed. New highs. Trend continuation.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate HOD. Check data quality and timestamp availability.

blocks.name: Lod
blocks.description: LOD (Low of Day) - Tracks the lowest price reached during the current trading day. Key support level and stop-hunt target. Neutral reference; bullish bounce or bearish breakdown depending on context.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish LOD - Price bounced from yesterday's low. Long positions favorable. Support confirmed. Reversal setup.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish LOD - Price broke below yesterday's low. Short positions favorable. Breakdown confirmed. Support broken.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral LOD - Price near yesterday's low equilibrium. Wait for bounce or breakdown confirmation.

signals.name: LOD_BOUNCE
signals.description: LOD bounce - Price bounced from yesterday's low. Confirmed reversal pattern. Enter longs. Support confirmed. Bullish setup.

signals.name: AT_LOD
signals.description: At LOD - Price testing yesterday's low. Key decision level. Watch for bounce or breakdown. High probability setup.

signals.name: ABOVE_LOD
signals.description: Above LOD - Price above yesterday's low. LOD acting as support. Bullish bias. Range trades or continuation.

signals.name: BELOW_LOD
signals.description: Below LOD - Price broke below yesterday's low. Bearish breakdown. Support broken. Downtrend continuation.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate LOD. Check data quality and timestamp availability.

blocks.name: Ihod
blocks.description: iHOD (Prior High of Day) - Tracks the previous session high of day as a reference level. Prior HOD becomes support or resistance in the new session. Neutral level for gap and continuation strategies.

signals.name: BULLISH_BREAK
signals.description: Bullish IHOD break - Price broke above previous intraday high. New IHOD made. Bullish momentum signal. Enter longs on breakout. Stop below previous IHOD. Target next resistance.

signals.name: BEARISH_REJECTION
signals.description: Bearish IHOD rejection - Price rejected at intraday high. Failed breakout. Reversal signal. Enter shorts on rejection. Stop above IHOD. Target support levels.

signals.name: AT_IHOD
signals.description: At IHOD - Price testing intraday high. Consolidation at resistance. Watch for breakout or rejection. Wait for confirmation before entry. Key decision point.

signals.name: BELOW_IHOD
signals.description: Below IHOD - Price below intraday high. Normal state. IHOD acting as resistance. Watch for move back toward IHOD or continuation lower.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish IHOD - Intraday high breakout confirmed. Strong bullish signal. Long positions favored. Momentum building. High probability continuation.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish IHOD - Rejection at intraday high confirmed. Bearish reversal signal. Short positions favored. Resistance holding. High probability decline.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral IHOD - No clear signal from intraday high. Price not near IHOD. Wait for price to approach resistance or establish new range.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate IHOD signals. Check data quality, timestamp availability, and sufficient bar history.

blocks.name: Ilod
blocks.description: iLOD (Prior Low of Day) - Tracks the previous session low of day as a reference level. Prior LOD becomes support in bullish conditions or target in bearish. Neutral level for session continuation strategies.

signals.name: BEARISH_BREAK
signals.description: Bearish ILOD break - Price broke below previous intraday low. New ILOD made. Bearish momentum signal. Enter shorts on breakdown. Stop above previous ILOD. Target next support.

signals.name: BULLISH_BOUNCE
signals.description: Bullish ILOD bounce - Price bounced at intraday low. Failed breakdown. Reversal signal. Enter longs on bounce. Stop below ILOD. Target resistance levels.

signals.name: AT_ILOD
signals.description: At ILOD - Price testing intraday low. Consolidation at support. Watch for breakdown or bounce. Wait for confirmation before entry. Key decision point.

signals.name: ABOVE_ILOD
signals.description: Above ILOD - Price above intraday low. Normal state. ILOD acting as support. Watch for move back toward ILOD or continuation higher.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish ILOD - Bounce at intraday low confirmed. Strong bullish reversal signal. Long positions favored. Support holding. High probability rally.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish ILOD - Intraday low breakdown confirmed. Bearish momentum signal. Short positions favored. Support broken. High probability continuation.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral ILOD - No clear signal from intraday low. Price not near ILOD. Wait for price to approach support or establish new range.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate ILOD signals. Check data quality, timestamp availability, and sufficient bar history.

blocks.name: Fifty Pct Hod Lod
blocks.description: Fifty Percent HOD/LOD - Identifies the 50% midpoint between the high and low of the day. Key equilibrium level where price frequently finds support or resistance. Neutral reference for intraday mean-reversion strategies.

signals.name: ABOVE_EQUILIBRIUM
signals.description: Above equilibrium - Price above yesterday's 50% level. Bullish bias. Premium zone. Enter longs on pullbacks to equilibrium. Stop below 50%. Target yesterday's high.

signals.name: BELOW_EQUILIBRIUM
signals.description: Below equilibrium - Price below yesterday's 50% level. Bearish bias. Discount zone. Enter shorts on rallies to equilibrium. Stop above 50%. Target yesterday's low.

signals.name: AT_EQUILIBRIUM
signals.description: At equilibrium - Price at yesterday's 50% fair value. Key decision point. Mean reversion setup. Watch for rejection or acceptance. High probability reversal zone.

signals.name: REJECTION_AT_EQ
signals.description: Rejection at equilibrium - Price rejected at yesterday's 50% level. Strong reversal signal. Enter in rejection direction. Tight stop at equilibrium. High confidence setup.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish 50% - Price holding above yesterday's equilibrium. Bullish market structure. Long positions favored. Premium zone confirmed.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish 50% - Price holding below yesterday's equilibrium. Bearish market structure. Short positions favored. Discount zone confirmed.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral equilibrium - Price not near yesterday's 50% level. No clear bias. Wait for price to approach fair value or establish new range.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate 50% equilibrium. Check data quality, timestamp availability, and sufficient historical data.

blocks.name: Fifty Pct Intra Hod Lod
blocks.description: Fifty Percent Intra HOD/LOD - Dynamic intraday midpoint of current session high/low range. Updates as new HOD/LOD form. Neutral level used for real-time intraday support/resistance and scalping.

signals.name: ABOVE_INTRA_EQ
signals.description: Above intraday equilibrium - Price above today's 50% level. Bullish intraday bias. Premium zone. Enter longs on pullbacks. Stop below intraday 50%. Scalp to IHOD.

signals.name: BELOW_INTRA_EQ
signals.description: Below intraday equilibrium - Price below today's 50% level. Bearish intraday bias. Discount zone. Enter shorts on rallies. Stop above intraday 50%. Scalp to ILOD.

signals.name: AT_INTRA_EQ
signals.description: At intraday equilibrium - Price at today's 50% fair value. Dynamic pivot point. Mean reversion zone. Watch for rejection. High probability scalp setup.

signals.name: REJECTION_AT_INTRA_EQ
signals.description: Rejection at intraday equilibrium - Price rejected at today's 50% level. Strong intraday reversal. Enter in rejection direction. Tight stop. Premium scalp signal.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish intraday 50% - Price holding above today's equilibrium. Bullish intraday structure. Long scalps favored. Premium zone active.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish intraday 50% - Price holding below today's equilibrium. Bearish intraday structure. Short scalps favored. Discount zone active.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral intraday equilibrium - Price not near today's 50% level. No clear intraday bias. Wait for price to approach dynamic fair value.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate intraday 50% equilibrium. Check data quality and sufficient intraday history.

blocks.name: How
blocks.description: HOW (High of Week) - Tracks the highest price of the current trading week. Major weekly resistance level used for swing-trading reference. Neutral level that identifies key longer-term supply zones.

signals.name: BELOW_HOW
signals.description: Below HOW - Price below weekly high. HOW acting as major resistance. Wait for breakout confirmation or range trades.

signals.name: BREAKING_OUT
signals.description: Breaking out HOW - Price attempting weekly high breakout. Watch for confirmation. Potential bullish momentum. Key resistance test.

signals.name: BREAKOUT_CONFIRMED
signals.description: HOW breakout confirmed - Price broke above weekly high. Strong bullish signal. Enter longs. New weekly highs. Momentum confirmed.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish HOW - Breaking out or above weekly high. Long positions favorable. Strong weekly momentum confirmed.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish HOW - Below weekly high. Short positions favorable or wait. Major resistance overhead. Weekly range bound.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral HOW - Near weekly high equilibrium. Wait for breakout or rejection confirmation. Key decision point.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate HOW. Check data quality and timestamp availability.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least one week of data for HOW calculation. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Us Settlement
blocks.description: US Settlement - Marks the CME US settlement price (typically 4 PM Eastern). Key daily reference level for BTC futures. Price often gravitates to or reacts at settlement. Neutral but significant institutional reference.

signals.name: ABOVE_SETTLEMENT
signals.description: Above settlement - Price above CME settlement (4 PM ET). Bullish bias. Institutional buying. Premium to futures. Long favorable.

signals.name: BELOW_SETTLEMENT
signals.description: Below settlement - Price below CME settlement (4 PM ET). Bearish bias. Institutional selling. Discount to futures. Short favorable.

signals.name: AT_SETTLEMENT
signals.description: At settlement - Price at CME settlement equilibrium. Key institutional level. Watch for bounce or rejection. High-probability setup. Futures alignment.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish settlement - Above or testing settlement from above. Long positions favorable. Institutional support present.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish settlement - Below settlement. Short positions favorable. Institutional resistance overhead. Futures discount.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral settlement - At equilibrium. No clear bias from settlement. Wait for direction or institutional activity.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate US settlement. Check data quality and timestamp availability.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need settlement time data. Wait for 4 PM ET settlement calculation.

blocks.name: Low
blocks.description: Low - Detects significant recent swing lows and structural price lows. Used as dynamic support reference and stop placement guide. Neutral indicator identifying where buyers have previously defended price.

signals.name: ABOVE_LOW
signals.description: Above LOW - Price above weekly low. LOW acting as major support. Bullish bias. Support holding. Range trades or continuation.

signals.name: AT_LOW
signals.description: At LOW - Price testing weekly low. Key decision level. Watch for bounce or breakdown. High probability setup. Major support test.

signals.name: BREAKDOWN_CONFIRMED
signals.description: LOW breakdown confirmed - Price broke below weekly low. Strong bearish signal. Enter shorts. New weekly lows. Breakdown confirmed.

signals.name: BREAKING_DOWN
signals.description: Breaking down LOW - Price attempting weekly low breakdown. Watch for confirmation. Potential bearish momentum. Key support test.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish LOW - Above weekly low or bouncing. Long positions favorable. Weekly support confirmed. Strong weekly bias up.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish LOW - Breaking down or below weekly low. Short positions favorable. Major support broken. Strong weekly momentum down.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral LOW - Near weekly low equilibrium. Wait for bounce or breakdown confirmation. Key weekly decision point.

signals.name: NO_LOW
signals.description: No LOW - No weekly low detected. Wait for more price data or check calculation.

signals.name: NO_LOW_DATA
signals.description: No LOW data - Cannot calculate weekly low. Check data quality and availability.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate LOW. Check data quality and timestamp availability.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least one week of data for LOW calculation. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Asia Session 50 Percent
blocks.description: Asia Session 50% - Marks the midpoint of the Asian session range as a key reference level. Price often revisits this level during London/NY sessions. Neutral level used for support/resistance and mean-reversion setups.

signals.name: ABOVE_ASIA_50
signals.description: Above Asia 50% - Price above Asia session midpoint. Bullish bias. Asia highs target. Mean reversion down possible. ICT key level.

signals.name: AT_ASIA_50
signals.description: At Asia 50% - Price at Asia session equilibrium. Key decision level. High-probability bounce or rejection. Mean reversion target. ICT pivot.

signals.name: BELOW_ASIA_50
signals.description: Below Asia 50% - Price below Asia session midpoint. Bearish bias. Asia lows target. Mean reversion up possible. ICT key level.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish Asia - Above or at Asia 50%. Long positions favorable. Asia session liquidity supporting price.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish Asia - Below Asia 50%. Short positions favorable. Asia session liquidity resisting price.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral Asia - At equilibrium. No clear bias from Asia session. Wait for direction.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate Asia session 50%. Check data quality and timestamp availability.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need Asia session data. Wait for Asia session completion.

blocks.name: Kill Zones
blocks.description: Kill Zones - ICT concept identifying high-probability trading windows: London Open (2-5 AM NY), NY Open (7-10 AM NY), and London Close (10-12 PM NY). Neutral timing filter — signals when institutional activity is most likely.

signals.name: LONDON_KZ
signals.description: London kill zone (07:00-10:00 UTC) - Strong trending moves. European institutional activity. High probability window. Good for breakouts.

signals.name: NY_AM_KZ
signals.description: NY AM kill zone (12:00-15:00 UTC) - OPTIMAL WINDOW. London/NY overlap. Maximum liquidity. Explosive moves. Highest probability trades.

signals.name: NY_PM_KZ
signals.description: NY PM kill zone (18:00-21:00 UTC) - Afternoon continuation. Medium probability. Follow AM session direction. Good for trend continuation.

signals.name: ASIAN_KZ
signals.description: Asian kill zone (00:00-03:00 UTC) - Low volume ranging. Weak probability. Range-bound trading. Avoid strong directional trades.

signals.name: LONDON_OPEN_KZ
signals.description: London open kill zone (02:00-05:00 UTC) - Pre-London positioning. Setup phase. Medium probability. Watch for London open direction.

signals.name: PRIME_TIME
signals.description: Prime time - High-priority kill zone active. Optimal trading conditions. Maximum institutional participation. Take high-quality setups.

signals.name: WAIT
signals.description: Wait period - Between kill zones. Low probability time. Stay patient. Preserve capital. Wait for next high-quality window.

signals.name: NO_KZ
signals.description: No kill zone - Outside all defined sessions. Minimal institutional activity. Avoid trading. Wait for recognized time window.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Active kill zone - Optimal trading time. High probability session. Institutional activity high. Take quality setups with confidence.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Inactive kill zone  - Low probability time. Outside optimal trading windows. Institutional activity minimal. Avoid trading.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Medium kill zone - Moderate probability time. Medium quality trading window. Consider selective trades. Monitor for next optimal zone.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate kill zones. Check timestamp data availability.

blocks.name: Session Time
blocks.description: Session Time - General session timing indicator that identifies current trading session (Asia, London, New York). Used as a context filter for session-specific strategies. Neutral — determines which session rules apply.

signals.name: PEAK_HOURS
signals.description: Peak hours (13:00-16:00 UTC) - London/NY overlap. Maximum liquidity. Explosive moves. Optimal trading window. Highest probability.

signals.name: ACTIVE_SESSION
signals.description: Active session - London or New York open. High volume and volatility. Good trading conditions. Take quality setups.

signals.name: MODERATE_SESSION
signals.description: Moderate session - Asian hours. Moderate activity. Range-bound typically. Trade with caution. Smaller positions.

signals.name: QUIET_SESSION
signals.description: Quiet session - Sydney hours. Low volume. Minimal volatility. Very tight ranges. Avoid most trades.

signals.name: OFF_SESSION
signals.description: Off-session - Between major sessions. Very low activity. Avoid trading. Wait for London or NY open.

signals.name: ACTIVE
signals.description: Active trading session - Good trading window. Major session open. Liquidity high. Take quality setups.

signals.name: INACTIVE
signals.description: Inactive session - Outside major trading hours. Low liquidity. Avoid trading. Wait for active session.

signals.name: NO_SIGNAL
signals.description: No session signal - Cannot determine session quality. Default to manual time management.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Session time provides timing context, not directional bias. Use ACTIVE/INACTIVE instead.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Session time provides timing context, not directional bias. Use ACTIVE/INACTIVE instead.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Session time provides timing context, not directional bias. Use ACTIVE/INACTIVE instead.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate session time. Check timestamp data availability.

blocks.name: Ema 20 50 Cross
blocks.description: EMA 20/50 Cross - Event-driven golden/death cross detector with volume confirmation

signals.name: GOLDEN_CROSS
signals.description: Golden cross - Fast EMA crossed above Slow EMA (bullish)

signals.name: DEATH_CROSS
signals.description: Death cross - Fast EMA crossed below Slow EMA (bearish)

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Golden cross - bullish (simple)

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Death cross - bearish (simple)

signals.name: NEUTRAL

blocks.name: Ema 255 Vector
blocks.description: EMA 255 Vector - Detects high-volume breaks through 255 EMA with PVSRA/TBD (major trend shifts, higher scoring)

signals.name: BULLISH_CLIMAX
signals.description: Bullish climax vector - crossed above 255 EMA with 140%+ volume (major HTF trend shift)

signals.name: BEARISH_CLIMAX
signals.description: Bearish climax vector - crossed below 255 EMA with 140%+ volume (major HTF trend shift)

signals.name: BULLISH_PSEUDO
signals.description: Bullish pseudo vector - crossed above 255 EMA with 100%+ volume AND rising EMA slope (RARE: requires trend confirmation)

signals.name: BEARISH_PSEUDO
signals.description: Bearish pseudo vector - crossed below 255 EMA with 100%+ volume AND falling EMA slope (RARE: requires trend confirmation)

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish vector break - any volume (simple)

signals.name: BEARISH

signals.name: NEUTRAL

signals.name: ERROR

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA

blocks.name: Ema 20 50 Trend
blocks.description: EMA 20/50 Trend - Tracks the relative position and slope of 20 and 50 EMAs as a trend context indicator. Bullish when 20 > 50 and rising; bearish when 20 < 50 and falling. Use as continuous trend filter.

signals.name: STRONG_UPTREND
signals.description: Strong uptrend - Price > Fast EMA > Slow EMA. Perfect bullish alignment. Add to longs. Trail stops below fast EMA.

signals.name: EARLY_UPTREND
signals.description: Early uptrend - Price above fast EMA, awaiting slow EMA cross. Early bullish signal. Consider long entry. Stop below fast EMA.

signals.name: STRONG_DOWNTREND
signals.description: Strong downtrend - Price < Fast EMA < Slow EMA. Perfect bearish alignment. Add to shorts. Trail stops above fast EMA.

signals.name: EARLY_DOWNTREND
signals.description: Early downtrend - Price below fast EMA, awaiting slow EMA cross. Early bearish signal. Consider short entry. Stop above fast EMA.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish EMA trend - Fast above slow or strong uptrend. Long positions favorable. Use fast EMA as support.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish EMA trend - Fast below slow or strong downtrend. Short positions favorable. Use fast EMA as resistance.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral EMA trend - EMAs converging or mixed alignment. No clear trend. Wait for alignment before entering.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 55 candles for EMA calculation. Wait for more price history.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate EMAs. Check data quality and EMA period configuration.

blocks.name: Ema 55 Vector
blocks.description: EMA 55 Vector - Detects high-volume breaks through 55 EMA with PVSRA/TBD methodology (differentiated thresholds)

signals.name: BULLISH_CLIMAX

blocks.name: Ema 200 Trend
blocks.description: EMA 200 Trend - Tracks price position relative to the 200 EMA (major long-term trend filter). Bullish when price is above, bearish when below. Primary macro trend direction indicator for strategy alignment.

signals.name: BULLISH_CROSS
signals.description: Bullish cross above 200 EMA - Major trend reversal. Long-term uptrend starting. Enter longs. Stop below 200 EMA.

signals.name: BEARISH_CROSS
signals.description: Bearish cross below 200 EMA - Major trend reversal. Long-term downtrend starting. Enter shorts. Stop above 200 EMA.

signals.name: ABOVE_200EMA
signals.description: Price above 200 EMA - Long-term bullish trend. Favor longs only. 200 EMA acts as support. Avoid shorts.

signals.name: BELOW_200EMA
signals.description: Price below 200 EMA - Long-term bearish trend. Favor shorts only. 200 EMA acts as resistance. Avoid longs.

signals.name: AT_200EMA
signals.description: Price at 200 EMA - Major support/resistance test. Wait for breakout or rejection. Set stops beyond 200 EMA.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish 200 EMA trend - Above 200 EMA or bullish cross. Long positions favorable. Use 200 EMA as trailing stop.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish 200 EMA trend - Below 200 EMA or bearish cross. Short positions favorable. Use 200 EMA as trailing stop.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral 200 EMA - No clear long-term trend. Market ranging. Wait for decisive break above or below 200 EMA.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 220 candles for 200 EMA calculation. Wait for more price history.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate 200 EMA. Check data quality and minimum period requirements.

blocks.name: Range Liquidity
blocks.description: Range Liquidity - Detects proximity to buy/sell-side liquidity with optional orderbook depth analysis

signals.name: NEAR_BUY_SIDE_LIQUIDITY
signals.description: Near buy-side liquidity - Approaching range high. Long stop clusters above. Expect rejection or sweep. Consider shorts. Take profits on longs. Stop above range high.

signals.name: NEAR_SELL_SIDE_LIQUIDITY
signals.description: Near sell-side liquidity - Approaching range low. Short stop clusters below. Expect bounce or sweep. Consider longs. Take profits on shorts. Stop below range low.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Near sell-side liquidity - Price at range support. Long stop clusters provide magnet. Enter longs. Target range high. Stop below range low.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Near buy-side liquidity - Price at range resistance. Short stop clusters provide magnet. Enter shorts. Target range low. Stop above range high.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Mid-range - Between liquidity zones. No clear magnet. Range-bound. Wait for approach to buy or sell-side before entering.

signals.name: ERROR

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA

blocks.name: Premium Discount Zones
blocks.description: Premium/Discount Zones - ICT premium/discount analysis with multi-timeframe alignment

signals.name: PRICE_IN_PREMIUM
signals.description: Premium zone - Price above fair value. Expensive. Institutions distributing. Expect pullback to equilibrium. Take profits on longs. Consider shorts. Stop above recent high.

signals.name: PRICE_IN_DISCOUNT
signals.description: Discount zone - Price below fair value. Cheap. Institutions accumulating. Prime buying opportunity. Enter longs. Target equilibrium. Stop below recent low.

signals.name: PRICE_AT_EQUILIBRIUM
signals.description: Equilibrium zone - Fair value. Balanced. No edge. Wait for move into premium or discount. Range-bound. Use tight stops or stand aside.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: In discount - Price at bargain levels. Institutional buying zone. Long positions highly favorable. Use discount as support.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: In premium - Price overextended. Institutional selling zone. Short positions favorable or take profits on longs. Mean reversion expected.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: At equilibrium - Fair value. No clear edge. Wait for discount to buy or premium to sell. Patient positioning required.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 20 candles for premium/discount analysis. Wait for wider price range to develop.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate premium/discount zones. Check range calculation and data quality.

signals.name: BEARISH_ZONE_REJECTION

signals.name: BULLISH_ZONE_BREAK

signals.name: BEARISH_ZONE_BREAK

signals.name: BULLISH

signals.name: BEARISH

blocks.name: Power Hour Trends
blocks.description: Power Hour Trends - Institutional trading hour trendline analysis with volatility regimes

signals.name: UPTREND_LOW
signals.description: Uptrend low volatility - Stable bullish trend. High confidence longs. Use trendline as support. Trail stops below channel.

signals.name: UPTREND_MODERATE
signals.description: Uptrend moderate volatility - Normal bullish trend. Long positions favorable. Standard stops. Watch channel bounds.

signals.name: UPTREND_HIGH
signals.description: Uptrend high volatility - Volatile bullish trend. Longs acceptable but risky. Wide stops. Reduce position size.

signals.name: UPTREND_EXTREME
signals.description: Uptrend extreme volatility - Unstable bullish. High risk. Small positions only. Very wide stops. Consider waiting.

signals.name: DOWNTREND_LOW
signals.description: Downtrend low volatility - Stable bearish trend. High confidence shorts. Use trendline as resistance. Trail stops above channel.

signals.name: DOWNTREND_MODERATE
signals.description: Downtrend moderate volatility - Normal bearish trend. Short positions favorable. Standard stops. Watch channel bounds.

signals.name: DOWNTREND_HIGH
signals.description: Downtrend high volatility - Volatile bearish trend. Shorts acceptable but risky. Wide stops. Reduce position size.

signals.name: DOWNTREND_EXTREME
signals.description: Downtrend extreme volatility - Unstable bearish. High risk. Small positions only. Very wide stops. Consider waiting.

signals.name: RANGING_LOW
signals.description: Range low volatility - Tight consolidation. Trade channel bounds. Buy support sell resistance. Quick exits. Small positions.

signals.name: RANGING_MODERATE
signals.description: Range moderate volatility - Normal consolidation. Range trade acceptable. Watch for breakout. Neutral bias.

signals.name: RANGING_HIGH
signals.description: Range high volatility - Choppy sideways. Difficult to trade. False breakouts likely. Reduce exposure. Wait for clarity.

signals.name: RANGING_EXTREME
signals.description: Range extreme volatility - Whipsaw action. Avoid trading. High slippage risk. Stand aside. Wait for trend or calm.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Power hour uptrend - Institutional buying during peak hours. Long positions favorable. Use power hour trendline as support.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Power hour downtrend - Institutional selling during peak hours. Short positions favorable. Use power hour trendline as resistance.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Power hour ranging - No clear institutional direction. Sideways action. Trade channel or wait for breakout.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_POWER_HOURS
signals.description: Insufficient power hours - Need at least 20 power hour sessions for trendline analysis. Wait for more institutional hour data.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot build power hour trendlines. Check timestamp format and hour filtering.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need minimum 80 bars for power hour analysis. Wait for more historical data.

blocks.name: Liquidity
blocks.description: Liquidity - ICT/LuxAlgo institutional liquidity zones (buyside/sellside stops, voids, breaches)

signals.name: BUYSIDE_ZONE_TOUCH
signals.description: Buyside liquidity touch - Price at short stop clusters. Institutional accumulation zone. Prime long entry. Expect bounce. Stop below zone.

signals.name: SELLSIDE_ZONE_TOUCH
signals.description: Sellside liquidity touch - Price at long stop clusters. Institutional distribution zone. Prime short entry. Expect reversal down. Stop above zone.

signals.name: BUYSIDE_BREACH
signals.description: Buyside breach - Stop hunt complete below buyside. Shorts absorbed. Bearish momentum confirmed. Continue shorts or exit longs. Trail stops.

signals.name: SELLSIDE_BREACH
signals.description: Sellside breach - Stop hunt complete above sellside. Longs absorbed. Bullish momentum confirmed. Continue longs or exit shorts. Trail stops.

signals.name: VOID_DETECTED
signals.description: Liquidity void detected - Rapid institutional move. Low volume gap. Expect void fill pullback. Fade extreme moves. Target void center.

signals.name: NEAR_BUYSIDE
signals.description: Near buyside liquidity - Approaching short stop zone. Prepare for potential bounce. Reduce short exposure. Watch for reversal signals.

signals.name: NEAR_SELLSIDE
signals.description: Near sellside liquidity - Approaching long stop zone. Prepare for potential reversal. Reduce long exposure. Watch for rejection signals.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish liquidity - At buyside zone or sellside breach. Institutions buying. Long positions favorable. Use zone as support.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish liquidity - At sellside zone or buyside breach. Institutions selling. Short positions favorable. Use zone as resistance.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Between liquidity zones - No clear institutional zones nearby. Range-bound. Wait for zone interaction before entering positions.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot detect liquidity zones. Check swing point calculation and data quality.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 40 candles for liquidity zone detection. Wait for more price history.
