blocks.name: Bollinger Bands
blocks.description: Bollinger Bands - Price envelope using standard deviations around a moving average. Detects overbought/oversold extremes, squeezes (low volatility), and band breakouts. Neutral to both directions, signals mean-reversion or breakout setups.

signals.name: ABOVE_UPPER
signals.description: Above upper band - Price extended beyond upper Bollinger Band. Overbought. Consider shorts or take profit on longs. Mean reversion likely.

signals.name: NEAR_UPPER
signals.description: Near upper band - Price approaching upper band. Strong uptrend. Momentum favors longs but watch for reversal. Consider partial profits.

signals.name: UPPER_HALF
signals.description: Upper half - Price in upper half of bands. Bullish bias. Above middle band. Trend strength moderate. Continue longs.

signals.name: LOWER_HALF
signals.description: Lower half - Price in lower half of bands. Bearish bias. Below middle band. Trend weakness. Consider shorts or wait.

signals.name: NEAR_LOWER
signals.description: Near lower band - Price approaching lower band. Strong downtrend or oversold. Watch for reversal. Potential long entries forming.

signals.name: BELOW_LOWER
signals.description: Below lower band - Price extended beyond lower Bollinger Band. Oversold. Consider longs or take profit on shorts. Mean reversion likely.

signals.name: BULLISH_REVERSAL
signals.description: Bullish reversal - Price bounced from lower band. Reversal signal. Enter longs. Stop below recent low. Target middle or upper band.

signals.name: BEARISH_REVERSAL
signals.description: Bearish reversal - Price rejected from upper band. Reversal signal. Enter shorts. Stop above recent high. Target middle or lower band.

signals.name: UPPER_BAND_WALK
signals.description: Upper band walk - Price riding upper band. Strong bullish trend. Stay in longs. Trend continuation pattern. Exit on close below middle band.

signals.name: LOWER_BAND_WALK
signals.description: Lower band walk - Price riding lower band. Strong bearish trend. Stay in shorts. Trend continuation pattern. Exit on close above middle band.

signals.name: SQUEEZE_BREAKOUT_BULL
signals.description: Bullish squeeze breakout - Squeeze broken upward. Enter longs aggressively. Strong momentum expected. Volatility expansion bullish.

signals.name: SQUEEZE_BREAKOUT_BEAR
signals.description: Bearish squeeze breakout - Squeeze broken downward. Enter shorts aggressively. Strong momentum expected. Volatility expansion bearish.

signals.name: MEDIUM_HIGH
signals.description: Medium-high volatility - Bollinger bands widening. Volatility increasing. Good for trend trading. Wider stops required.

signals.name: MEDIUM_LOW
signals.description: Medium-low volatility - Bollinger bands narrowing. Volatility decreasing. Consolidation phase. Watch for squeeze breakout.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish - Price action bullish vs Bollinger Bands. Long positions favorable. Trend or reversal favors upside.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish - Price action bearish vs Bollinger Bands. Short positions favorable. Trend or reversal favors downside.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral - Price near middle band. No clear bias. Wait for directional signal before trading.

blocks.name: Adr
blocks.description: ADR (Average Daily Range) - Measures average daily price range to assess volatility and set realistic profit targets. Neutral indicator used for position sizing and stop placement. Alerts when price approaches daily range extension.

signals.name: CALM
signals.description: Calm - Very low volatility. Daily range <30% of ADR. Potential compression before breakout. Increase position size. Tight stops possible.

signals.name: NORMAL
signals.description: Normal - Typical daily range. 50-70% of ADR. Standard volatility conditions. Normal position sizing. Regular stop placement.

signals.name: ELEVATED
signals.description: Elevated - Higher than normal volatility. 130-170% of ADR. Widen stops. Adjust position size. Increased risk environment.

signals.name: HIGH
signals.description: High - Significant volatility. 170-200% of ADR. Widen stops significantly. Reduce position size 25-50%. Major price movement underway.

signals.name: EXTREME
signals.description: Extreme - Exceptional volatility. >200% of ADR. Maximum caution. Reduce position size 50%. Very wide stops required. News event likely.

signals.name: VOLATILE
signals.description: Volatile - High volatility expanding. >150% of ADR and increasing. Breakout in progress. Momentum environment. Adjust risk parameters.

signals.name: NEAR_ADR
signals.description: Near ADR - Daily range at average. 95-105% of ADR. Perfect normal volatility. Standard position sizing. Typical trading conditions.

signals.name: ABOVE_ADR
signals.description: Above ADR - Moderately elevated range. 105-150% of ADR. Slightly higher volatility. Consider 10-20% position reduction. Widen stops moderately.

signals.name: BELOW_ADR
signals.description: Below ADR - Low daily range. 30-50% of ADR. Consolidation phase. Can increase position size 25%. Tighter stops. Watch for breakout.

signals.name: WITHIN_ADR
signals.description: Within ADR - Range below average. 70-95% of ADR. Slightly quieter than typical. Normal position sizing. Standard stop placement.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish volatility - Ranges expanding. Energy building. Favorable for breakouts. Momentum increasing. Good for trending strategies.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish volatility - Ranges contracting. Consolidation phase. Unfavorable for entries. Wait for expansion. Compression before move.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral volatility - Stable range conditions. No significant expansion or contraction. Standard trading environment.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate ADR. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 2 periods for ADR calculation. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Atr
blocks.description: ATR (Average True Range) - Classic volatility indicator measuring average bar range over a period. Used to set dynamic stop losses and take profit targets. Neutral signal essential for risk management in all strategies.

signals.name: EXTREME
signals.description: Extreme volatility - Market moving >2000 USD per 15min. Use very wide stops (3x+ ATR).

signals.name: VERY_HIGH
signals.description: Very high volatility - Large price swings. Use wider stops (2.5x ATR). Favorable for breakouts.

signals.name: HIGH
signals.description: High volatility - Active market. Use standard-to-wide stops (2x-2.5x ATR). Good for trend trading.

signals.name: NORMAL
signals.description: Normal volatility - Regular market activity. Use standard stops (2x ATR). Suitable for all strategies.

signals.name: CALM
signals.description: Low volatility - Tight consolidation. Use conservative stops (1.5x ATR). Range trading favorable.

signals.name: EXTREME_HIGH
signals.description: Volatility at 95th+ percentile - Historically extreme. Major event or trend. Widen all stops significantly.

signals.name: EXTREME_LOW
signals.description: Volatility at <5th percentile - Historically low. Consolidation before breakout. Tighten stops, prepare for expansion.

signals.name: VERY_LOW
signals.description: Volatility at 5th-30th percentile - Below average. Tight ranges. Breakout setup developing.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Volatility expanding - Energy building in market. Favorable for breakout entries and trend continuation.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Volatility contracting - Market consolidating. Reduce position sizes. Favor range-bound strategies.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Volatility stable - No directional bias. Market in equilibrium. Monitor for regime change.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Data validation error - Cannot calculate ATR. Check data quality and completeness.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need 14+ candles to calculate ATR. Wait for more data.

blocks.name: Market Depth
blocks.description: Market Depth - Volume-based liquidity analysis with spread estimation

signals.name: HIGH_LIQUIDITY
signals.description: High liquidity - Volume 1.5x+ above average. Excellent execution. Tight spreads. Increase position sizes up to 20%. Minimal slippage expected.

signals.name: NORMAL_LIQUIDITY
signals.description: Normal liquidity - Average volume conditions. Standard execution quality. Use normal position sizes. Expect standard slippage.

signals.name: LOW_LIQUIDITY
signals.description: Low liquidity - Volume below 50% of average. Poor execution risk. Reduce positions 40-60%. Wide spreads. Expect significant slippage.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Good liquidity context - Execution quality favorable for long entries. Normal to high volume. Proceed with standard risk.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Good liquidity context - Execution quality favorable for short entries. Normal to high volume. Proceed with standard risk.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Normal liquidity - Standard market conditions. Neither advantage nor disadvantage. Use baseline position sizing.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate market depth. Check volume data quality and completeness.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 10 candles for liquidity analysis. Wait for more volume history.

blocks.name: Order Flow Imbalance
blocks.description: Order Flow Imbalance - Buy/sell pressure detection from volume-weighted bar analysis

signals.name: BUY_IMBALANCE
signals.description: Buy imbalance - 65%+ volume to upside. Strong institutional buying. Enter longs aggressively. Trail stops below recent lows.

signals.name: SELL_IMBALANCE
signals.description: Sell imbalance - 65%+ volume to downside. Strong institutional selling. Enter shorts or exit longs. Trail stops above recent highs.

signals.name: BALANCED
signals.description: Balanced order flow - Equal buy/sell pressure. No clear institutional bias. Reduce positions. Wait for imbalance signal.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Buy pressure detected - Institutions accumulating. Long positions favorable. Use volume-weighted stops.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Sell pressure detected - Institutions distributing. Short positions favorable or exit longs. Use volume-weighted stops.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Balanced institutional flow - No clear pressure. Sideways action expected. Reduce exposure until bias emerges.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate order flow. Check volume data quality and bar completeness.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 10 candles for order flow analysis. Wait for more volume history.

blocks.name: Ema Crossover
blocks.description: EMA Crossover - Fast/slow EMA crosses (rare events) and trend alignment (continuous state)

signals.name: GOLDEN_CROSS
signals.description: Golden Cross - Fast EMA crossed above slow EMA. Major bullish reversal. Enter longs aggressively. Trail stops below fast EMA.

signals.name: DEATH_CROSS
signals.description: Death Cross - Fast EMA crossed below slow EMA. Major bearish reversal. Enter shorts aggressively. Trail stops above fast EMA.

signals.name: BULLISH_ALIGNMENT
signals.description: Bullish alignment - Fast EMA above slow EMA. Uptrend confirmed. Hold longs. Buy dips to fast EMA. Avoid shorts.

signals.name: BEARISH_ALIGNMENT
signals.description: Bearish alignment - Fast EMA below slow EMA. Downtrend confirmed. Hold shorts. Sell rallies to fast EMA. Avoid longs.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish EMA trend - Fast above slow or golden cross. Long positions favorable. Stops below slow EMA.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish EMA trend - Fast below slow or death cross. Short positions favorable. Stops above slow EMA.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: EMAs converging - Trend weakening or reversal imminent. Reduce positions. Wait for clear cross before re-entering.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate EMAs. Check data quality and EMA periods configuration.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 200 candles for EMA calculation. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Vwap
blocks.description: VWAP - Volume-weighted average price, institutional benchmark for premium/discount zones

signals.name: ABOVE_VWAP
signals.description: Price above VWAP - Premium zone. Institutions selling. Expect mean reversion. Consider shorts or take profits on longs. Stop above recent high.

signals.name: BELOW_VWAP
signals.description: Price below VWAP - Discount zone. Institutions buying. Favorable for longs. Mean reversion expected upward. Stop below recent low.

signals.name: AT_VWAP
signals.description: Price at VWAP - Fair value equilibrium. High probability reversal zone. Prime entry point. Watch for acceptance or rejection. Use VWAP as stop.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Above VWAP - Price in premium. Bullish bias but expect pullback to VWAP. Trail stops. Consider profit taking.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Below VWAP - Price in discount. Bearish bias but expect rally to VWAP. Long entries favorable on dips. Use VWAP target.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: At VWAP - Fair value zone. No bias. Wait for breakout above or breakdown below before entering. High probability pivot.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate VWAP. Check volume data quality and price completeness.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 10 candles for VWAP calculation. Wait for more price and volume history.

blocks.name: Anchored Vwap
blocks.description: Anchored VWAP - Volume-weighted average price from smart anchor points (swing highs/lows)

signals.name: AT_VWAP
signals.description: Price at anchored VWAP - Institutional reversal zone. Prime entry level. Expect bounce or rejection. Use VWAP as stop reference.

signals.name: NEAR_VWAP
signals.description: Price within 1% of anchored VWAP - Approaching key level. Prepare for reaction. Tighten stops. Watch for acceptance or rejection.

signals.name: ABOVE_ANCHORED_VWAP
signals.description: Price above anchored VWAP - Bullish control. VWAP acts as support. Long bias. Stop below VWAP plus buffer.

signals.name: BELOW_ANCHORED_VWAP
signals.description: Price below anchored VWAP - Bearish control. VWAP acts as resistance. Short bias. Stop above VWAP plus buffer.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Above anchored VWAP - Institutions buying. Long positions favorable. VWAP support below. Trail stops under VWAP.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Below anchored VWAP - Institutions selling. Short positions favorable. VWAP resistance above. Trail stops above VWAP.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: At anchored VWAP - Institutional equilibrium. No clear bias. Wait for acceptance above or rejection below before entering.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate anchored VWAP. Check anchor point selection and volume data quality.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 20 candles for anchored VWAP calculation. Wait for more price history from anchor.

blocks.name: Market Structure Shift
blocks.description: Market Structure Shift (MSS) - Detects a significant change in the dominant market structure (higher highs to lower highs or vice versa). Stronger than ChoCh, confirms trend reversal. Neutral — direction determined by shift type.

signals.name: BEARISH_MSS
signals.description: Bearish MSS - Market structure shift bearish. Trend reversal confirmed. Uptrend broken. Enter shorts. Institutional distribution. Strong reversal signal.

signals.name: BEARISH_RETEST
signals.description: Bearish retest - MSS retest bearish. Retesting broken structure. Enter shorts on confirmation. Secondary entry opportunity. Structure holding as resistance.

signals.name: BULLISH_MSS
signals.description: Bullish MSS - Market structure shift bullish. Trend reversal confirmed. Downtrend broken. Enter longs. Institutional accumulation. Strong reversal signal.

signals.name: BULLISH_RETEST
signals.description: Bullish retest - MSS retest bullish. Retesting broken structure. Enter longs on confirmation. Secondary entry opportunity. Structure holding as support.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish MSS - Bullish market structure shift or retest. Long positions favorable. Trend reversal up confirmed.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish MSS - Bearish market structure shift or retest. Short positions favorable. Trend reversal down confirmed.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral MSS - No market structure shift. Wait for trend reversal or structure break.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate market structure shift. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need enough bars for MSS detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Balanced Price Range
blocks.description: Balanced Price Range (BPR) - ICT concept identifying an overlap between a bullish and bearish fair value gap. Acts as a balanced equilibrium zone. Neutral area where price is drawn for consolidation before directional move.

signals.name: IN_RANGE_LOW
signals.description: In range low - Price in lower half of balanced price range. Bullish setup. Buy at discount. Mean reversion up expected. ICT accumulation zone.

signals.name: IN_RANGE_HIGH
signals.description: In range high - Price in upper half of balanced price range. Bearish setup. Sell at premium. Mean reversion down expected. ICT distribution zone.

signals.name: NOT_IN_RANGE
signals.description: Not in range - Price outside balanced price range. No range setups. Wait for reentry or new range formation.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish range - In lower half of balance. Long positions favorable. Discount pricing. Mean reversion up.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish range - In upper half of balance. Short positions favorable. Premium pricing. Mean reversion down.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral range - Outside balanced price range. No clear bias. Wait for range reentry.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate balanced price range. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need enough bars for range detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Break Of Structure
blocks.description: Break of Structure (BOS) - SMC/ICT concept detecting a break of the previous swing high (bullish BOS) or swing low (bearish BOS). Confirms trend continuation. Directionally neutral — signals trend direction based on which swing breaks.

signals.name: BEARISH_BOS
signals.description: Bearish BOS - Break of structure downward. Downtrend continuation confirmed. Enter shorts. Trend strength. Lower lows forming. ICT sell signal.

signals.name: BULLISH_BOS
signals.description: Bullish BOS - Break of structure upward. Uptrend continuation confirmed. Enter longs. Trend strength. Higher highs forming. ICT buy signal.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish BOS - Bullish break of structure detected. Long positions highly favorable. Uptrend continuation. Strong momentum.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish BOS - Bearish break of structure detected. Short positions highly favorable. Downtrend continuation. Strong momentum.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral BOS - No break of structure. Wait for trend continuation or reversal signals.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate break of structure. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need enough bars for BOS detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Mitigation Block
blocks.description: Mitigation Block - SMC concept identifying previous order blocks that have been partially filled and become re-entry zones. Price returns to mitigate unfilled orders. Neutral level for precision re-entry after reversal.

signals.name: BEARISH_MITIGATION
signals.description: Bearish mitigation - Order block tested bearish. Institutional resistance tested. Enter shorts. Unfilled orders present. Reversal zone.

signals.name: BULLISH_MITIGATION
signals.description: Bullish mitigation - Order block tested bullish. Institutional support tested. Enter longs. Unfilled orders present. Reversal zone.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish mitigation - Bullish order block tested. Long positions favorable. Institutional support zone. High probability bounce.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish mitigation - Bearish order block tested. Short positions favorable. Institutional resistance zone. High probability rejection.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral mitigation - No order block tests detected. Wait for institutional zones or key level tests.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate mitigation block. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need enough bars for mitigation detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Swing Failure Pattern
blocks.description: Swing Failure Pattern (SFP) - Detects a false breakout beyond a prior swing high/low that immediately reverses (stop hunt). Bearish SFP busts buy-side liquidity; bullish SFP busts sell-side. Reversal signal neutral in bias.

signals.name: BEARISH_SFP
signals.description: Bearish SFP - Swing failure pattern bearish. Failed breakout up then reversal. Enter shorts. Stop hunt complete. Liquidity grabbed. Reversal confirmed.

signals.name: BULLISH_SFP
signals.description: Bullish SFP - Swing failure pattern bullish. Failed breakdown then reversal. Enter longs. Stop hunt complete. Liquidity grabbed. Reversal confirmed.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish SFP - Bullish swing failure detected. Long positions highly favorable. Failed low, reversal up. Stop hunt complete.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish SFP - Bearish swing failure detected. Short positions highly favorable. Failed high, reversal down. Stop hunt complete.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral SFP - No swing failure patterns detected. Wait for failed breakouts or stop hunts.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate swing failure pattern. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need enough bars for SFP detection. Wait for more price history and swing points.

blocks.name: Change Of Character
blocks.description: Change of Character (ChoCh) - SMC/ICT concept detecting the first counter-trend break that signals a potential trend reversal. Opposite of BOS — confirms trend change. Directionally neutral, signals reversal in either direction.

signals.name: BEARISH_CHOCH
signals.description: Bearish CHOCH - Change of character bearish. Early reversal signal. Uptrend weakening. Enter shorts. Market character shift. Trend exhaustion.

signals.name: BULLISH_CHOCH
signals.description: Bullish CHOCH - Change of character bullish. Early reversal signal. Downtrend weakening. Enter longs. Market character shift. Trend exhaustion.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish CHOCH - Bullish change of character detected. Long positions favorable. Early reversal up. Downtrend weakness showing.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish CHOCH - Bearish change of character detected. Short positions favorable. Early reversal down. Uptrend weakness showing.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral CHOCH - No change of character. Wait for trend weakness or reversal signals.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate change of character. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need enough bars for CHOCH detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Inducement
blocks.description: Inducement - SMC/ICT concept where price is manipulated to trigger stops before the true move. Identifies liquidity grabs designed to induce retail traders before institutional entry. Neutral signal for stop-hunt confirmation.

signals.name: BEARISH_INDUCEMENT
signals.description: Bearish inducement - False breakout up then reversal down. Retail trapped long. Enter shorts. Smart money manipulation. Liquidity grab complete.

signals.name: BULLISH_INDUCEMENT
signals.description: Bullish inducement - False breakdown then reversal up. Retail trapped short. Enter longs. Smart money manipulation. Liquidity grab complete.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish inducement - Bullish inducement trap detected. Long positions favorable. Reversal up confirmed. Smart money buying.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish inducement - Bearish inducement trap detected. Short positions favorable. Reversal down confirmed. Smart money selling.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral inducement - No inducement traps detected. Wait for false moves and reversals.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate inducement. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need enough bars for inducement detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Optimal Trade Entry
blocks.description: Optimal Trade Entry (OTE) - ICT concept marking the 61.8%-79% Fibonacci retracement zone of an impulse move as the ideal entry area. High-probability pullback entry zone. Neutral but aligns with prior trend direction.

signals.name: BEARISH_OTE
signals.description: Bearish OTE - Price in optimal trade entry zone bearish. 62-79% Fib retracement. Enter shorts. ICT sweet spot. High probability reversal down.

signals.name: BULLISH_OTE
signals.description: Bullish OTE - Price in optimal trade entry zone bullish. 62-79% Fib retracement. Enter longs. ICT sweet spot. High probability reversal up.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish OTE - In optimal trade entry zone for longs. 62-79% retracement complete. Long positions highly favorable. ICT entry zone.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish OTE - In optimal trade entry zone for shorts. 62-79% retracement complete. Short positions highly favorable. ICT entry zone.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral OTE - Not in optimal trade entry zone. Wait for 62-79% retracement or better entry levels.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate optimal trade entry. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need enough bars for OTE calculation. Wait for more price action and swing detection.

blocks.name: Displacement
blocks.description: Displacement - SMC/ICT concept detecting a strong, impulsive move leaving a fair value gap (imbalance). Signals institutional participation and is used to identify the starting point of a new price leg. Neutral, direction context-dependent.

signals.name: BEARISH_DISPLACEMENT
signals.description: Bearish displacement - Fast downmove rejecting consolidation. Strong bearish momentum. Enter shorts. Institutional selling. Trend acceleration down.

signals.name: BULLISH_DISPLACEMENT
signals.description: Bullish displacement - Fast upmove rejecting consolidation. Strong bullish momentum. Enter longs. Institutional buying. Trend acceleration up.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish displacement - Strong upward momentum detected. Long positions highly favorable. Institutional buying surge.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish displacement - Strong downward momentum detected. Short positions highly favorable. Institutional selling surge.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral displacement - No strong displacement. Wait for momentum surge or consolidation break.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate displacement. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need enough bars for displacement detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Elliott Wave Oscillator
blocks.description: Elliott Wave Oscillator - Momentum indicator (5-SMA minus 35-SMA) for wave confirmation

signals.name: BEARISH_DIVERGENCE
signals.description: Bearish divergence - Price making higher highs but EWO making lower highs. Reversal imminent. Take profit on longs, prepare shorts.

signals.name: BULLISH_DIVERGENCE
signals.description: Bullish divergence - Price making lower lows but EWO making higher lows. Reversal imminent. Take profit on shorts, prepare longs.

signals.name: BEARISH_MOMENTUM_INCREASING
signals.description: Bearish momentum accelerating - EWO diving deeper below zero. Strong downtrend. Add to shorts. Trail stops.

signals.name: BEARISH_MOMENTUM_WEAKENING
signals.description: Bearish momentum weakening - EWO rising toward zero. Downtrend losing steam. Tighten stops on shorts. Reversal possible.

signals.name: BULLISH_MOMENTUM_INCREASING
signals.description: Bullish momentum accelerating - EWO rising higher above zero. Strong uptrend. Add to longs. Trail stops.

signals.name: BULLISH_MOMENTUM_WEAKENING
signals.description: Bullish momentum weakening - EWO falling toward zero. Uptrend losing steam. Tighten stops on longs. Reversal possible.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish EWO - Oscillator above zero line. Bullish momentum detected. Long positions favorable.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish EWO - Oscillator below zero line. Bearish momentum detected. Short positions favorable.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral EWO - Oscillator near zero line. No clear momentum. Wait for decisive move before entering.

signals.name: NEUTRAL_MOMENTUM
signals.description: Neutral momentum - EWO hovering near zero. Market in equilibrium. No clear trend. Avoid entries until breakout.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate Elliott Wave Oscillator. Check data quality and SMA periods.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 35 candles for EWO calculation. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Elliott Wave Count
blocks.description: Elliott Wave Count - Identifies 5-wave impulse patterns with MTF context

signals.name: WAVE_1_BULLISH
signals.description: Wave 1 bullish - New impulse starting. Early long entry favorable. Confirm with volume. Stop below Wave 1 start.

signals.name: WAVE_1_BEARISH
signals.description: Wave 1 bearish - New impulse starting. Early short entry favorable. Confirm with volume. Stop above Wave 1 start.

signals.name: WAVE_2_BULLISH
signals.description: Wave 2 correction (bullish) - Deep retracement after Wave 1. Prime long entry. Wave 3 (strongest) next. Stop below Wave 2 low.

signals.name: WAVE_2_BEARISH
signals.description: Wave 2 correction (bearish) - Deep retracement after Wave 1. Prime short entry. Wave 3 (strongest) next. Stop above Wave 2 high.

signals.name: WAVE_3_BULLISH
signals.description: Wave 3 bullish - Strongest wave of impulse. Add to longs. Trail stops. Expect extended move. Never fade Wave 3.

signals.name: WAVE_3_BEARISH
signals.description: Wave 3 bearish - Strongest wave of impulse. Add to shorts. Trail stops. Expect extended move. Never fade Wave 3.

signals.name: WAVE_4_BULLISH
signals.description: Wave 4 correction (bullish) - Shallow pullback. Hold longs, add on dip. Wave 5 final push coming. Stop below Wave 4 low.

signals.name: WAVE_4_BEARISH
signals.description: Wave 4 correction (bearish) - Shallow bounce. Hold shorts, add on rally. Wave 5 final push coming. Stop above Wave 4 high.

signals.name: WAVE_5_BULLISH
signals.description: Wave 5 complete (bullish) - Bearish reversal imminent. Take profit on longs. Consider short entry. Stop above Wave 5 high.

signals.name: WAVE_5_BEARISH
signals.description: Wave 5 complete (bearish) - Bullish reversal imminent. Take profit on shorts. Consider long entry. Stop below Wave 5 low.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish wave detected - Elliott Wave impulse in progress. Long positions favorable. Use wave-based stops.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish wave detected - Elliott Wave impulse in progress. Short positions favorable. Use wave-based stops.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: No clear wave structure - Market in transition or corrective phase. Wait for impulse wave to form before entering.

signals.name: WAVE_UNCERTAIN
signals.description: Wave count uncertain - Insufficient pivots or ambiguous structure. Wait for clearer wave pattern before trading.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_PIVOTS
signals.description: Insufficient pivots - Need more price swings to identify wave structure. Monitor for swing points developing.

signals.name: NO_PATTERN
signals.description: No Elliott Wave pattern - Market not in clear impulse or corrective wave. Wait for structure to develop.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate Elliott Wave count. Check data quality and timeframe completeness.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 50 candles for Elliott Wave analysis. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Fibonacci Retracements
blocks.description: Fibonacci Retracements - Identifies reversal levels using Golden Ratio and Fib levels (23.6%, 38.2%, 50%, 61.8%, 78.6%)

signals.name: AT_FIB_23
signals.description: Price at 23.6% retracement - Minor level. Weak pullback. Strong trend continuation. Use for profit targets not entries.

signals.name: AT_FIB_38
signals.description: Price at 38.2% retracement - Shallow pullback. Healthy trend continuation zone. Add to positions. Stop below next Fib.

signals.name: AT_FIB_50
signals.description: Price at 50% retracement - Key psychological level. Strong support/resistance. Entry favorable with confirmation. Tight stops.

signals.name: AT_FIB_61
signals.description: Price at 61.8% Golden Ratio - Strongest reversal level. Prime entry zone. Expect bounce or rejection. Set stops beyond level.

signals.name: AT_FIB_78
signals.description: Price at 78.6% retracement - Deep pullback. Last chance reversal zone. High risk/reward. Wide stops required.

signals.name: BETWEEN_LEVELS
signals.description: Price between Fibonacci levels - No key support/resistance. Wait for next Fib level. Avoid entries in no-mans-land.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: At Fibonacci level (uptrend) - Price at support level in uptrend. Long entry favorable. Use Fib-based stops.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: At Fibonacci level (downtrend) - Price at resistance level in downtrend. Short entry favorable. Use Fib-based stops.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Between Fibonacci levels - No clear support/resistance. Wait for next key level before entering positions.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate Fibonacci levels. Check swing point detection and data quality.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 20 candles for Fibonacci analysis. Wait for more swing points.

blocks.name: Liquidity Sweep
blocks.description: Liquidity Sweep - Detects price sweeping beyond a recent swing high/low to absorb stop orders before reversing. Bearish sweep busts buy-side liquidity and signals downside; bullish sweep busts sell-side. Use to confirm rejection entries.

signals.name: BEARISH_SWEEP
signals.description: Bearish liquidity sweep - High swept then reversed down. Stop hunt complete. Retail trapped long. Enter shorts. Institutional selling. Reversal confirmed.

signals.name: BULLISH_SWEEP
signals.description: Bullish liquidity sweep - Low swept then reversed up. Stop hunt complete. Retail trapped short. Enter longs. Institutional buying. Reversal confirmed.

signals.name: NO_SWEEP
signals.description: No sweep - No liquidity sweeps detected. No stop hunts. No sweep setups available.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish sweep - Bullish liquidity sweep detected. Lows swept. Reversal up confirmed. Long positions highly favorable. Stop hunt complete.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish sweep - Bearish liquidity sweep detected. Highs swept. Reversal down confirmed. Short positions highly favorable. Stop hunt complete.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral sweep - No active liquidity sweep. Wait for stop hunts and reversals.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate liquidity sweeps. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 20 bars for liquidity sweep detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Order Block
blocks.description: Order Block - SMC/ICT concept identifying the last bullish or bearish candle before a strong displacement move. Represents institutional order placement zones. Bullish OBs act as demand; bearish OBs as supply for re-entry.

signals.name: BEARISH_OB
signals.description: Bearish order block - Institutional selling zone. Last up-candle before downmove. Enter shorts on retest. Smart money distribution. High probability resistance.

signals.name: BULLISH_OB
signals.description: Bullish order block - Institutional buying zone. Last down-candle before upmove. Enter longs on retest. Smart money accumulation. High probability support.

signals.name: NO_OB
signals.description: No OB - No order blocks detected. No institutional zones. No OB setups available.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish OB - Bullish order block detected. Long positions highly favorable. Institutional buy zone. Support likely to hold.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish OB - Bearish order block detected. Short positions highly favorable. Institutional sell zone. Resistance likely to hold.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral OB - Not at order block zone currently. Wait for price to retest OB or new OB to form.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate order blocks. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 10 bars for order block detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Breaker Block
blocks.description: Breaker Block - A former order block that has been broken through and now acts as opposing support/resistance. Bullish breakers (former bearish OB) become support; bearish breakers become resistance. Directionally context-dependent.

signals.name: BEARISH_BREAKER
signals.description: Bearish breaker block - Failed bullish order block broken down. Market structure shift. Institutional selling zone. Enter shorts on retest. Reversal confirmed. High probability.

signals.name: BULLISH_BREAKER
signals.description: Bullish breaker block - Failed bearish order block broken up. Market structure shift. Institutional buying zone. Enter longs on retest. Reversal confirmed. High probability.

signals.name: NO_BREAKER
signals.description: No breaker block - No failed order blocks detected. No market structure shift. No breaker setups available.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish breaker - Bullish breaker block detected. Market structure shift to upside. Long positions highly favorable. Failed bearish OB now support.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish breaker - Bearish breaker block detected. Market structure shift to downside. Short positions highly favorable. Failed bullish OB now resistance.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral breaker - No breaker blocks detected. No market structure shifts. Wait for failed order blocks.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate breaker blocks. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need enough bars for breaker block detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Fair Value Gap
blocks.description: Fair Value Gap (FVG) - ICT concept identifying a three-candle price imbalance where the wicks of the first and third candles do not overlap. Bullish FVG supports price; bearish FVG acts as resistance. Price tends to fill gaps.

signals.name: BEARISH_FVG
signals.description: Bearish Fair Value Gap - Price inefficiency from fast downmove. Gap unfilled. Enter shorts on retest. Institutional selling imbalance. Gap acts as resistance. Fill likely.

signals.name: BULLISH_FVG
signals.description: Bullish Fair Value Gap - Price inefficiency from fast upmove. Gap unfilled. Enter longs on retest. Institutional buying imbalance. Gap acts as support. Fill likely.

signals.name: NO_FVG
signals.description: No FVG - No Fair Value Gaps detected. No price inefficiencies. No gap setups available.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish FVG - Bullish Fair Value Gap detected. Long positions favorable. Price inefficiency upside. Gap support likely.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish FVG - Bearish Fair Value Gap detected. Short positions favorable. Price inefficiency downside. Gap resistance likely.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral FVG - Not in FVG zone currently. Wait for price to retest gaps or new gaps to form.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate Fair Value Gaps. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 10 bars for FVG detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Trailing Stop
blocks.description: Trailing Stop - Dynamic stop loss that moves with price to lock in profits as a trade moves favorably. Neutral risk management tool that does not generate entry signals. Used to manage exits and protect gains in trending moves.

signals.name: STOP_TRIGGERED
signals.description: Stop triggered - Price hit trailing stop level. Exit position immediately. Protect capital. Move to next opportunity.

signals.name: STOP_UPDATED
signals.description: Stop updated - Trailing stop moved higher/lower. Lock in profits. Position still valid. Tighten risk management.

signals.name: STOP_ACTIVE
signals.description: Stop active - Trailing stop in place. Monitor position. Price healthy distance from stop. Continue trade management.

signals.name: NO_STOP
signals.description: No stop - No trailing stop signal. Set appropriate stops manually. Risk management required.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish stop context - Long stop levels active. Hold long positions. Price above trailing stop. Uptrend protected.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish stop context - Short stop levels active. Hold short positions. Price below trailing stop. Downtrend protected.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral stop - Between stop levels. No clear risk signal. Manual risk management needed. Wait for directional clarity.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate trailing stops. Check data quality and ATR calculation.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least (ATR period + 10) candles for trailing stop calculation. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Ict Silver Bullet
blocks.description: ICT Silver Bullet - ICT-based precision entry during specific kill zone windows (10:00-11:00 NY). Identifies fair value gaps and liquidity sweeps to enter with smart money. Bearish or bullish depending on session context.

signals.name: BEARISH_FVG_IN_ZONE
signals.description: Bearish FVG in zone - Price in bearish Fair Value Gap. Institutional selling imbalance. Enter shorts. Silver Bullet setup. Stop above gap. Target gap fill.

signals.name: BEARISH_FVG_RETEST
signals.description: Bearish FVG retest - Price retesting bearish Fair Value Gap. High-probability short entry. Institutional distribution zone. Premium signal. Tight stop above gap.

signals.name: BULLISH_FVG_IN_ZONE
signals.description: Bullish FVG in zone - Price in bullish Fair Value Gap. Institutional buying imbalance. Enter longs. Silver Bullet setup. Stop below gap. Target gap fill.

signals.name: BULLISH_FVG_RETEST
signals.description: Bullish FVG retest - Price retesting bullish Fair Value Gap. High-probability long entry. Institutional accumulation zone. Premium signal. Tight stop below gap.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish Silver Bullet - Bullish FVG detected or retested. Long positions highly favorable. ICT institutional buy zone. High probability setup.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish Silver Bullet - Bearish FVG detected or retested. Short positions highly favorable. ICT institutional sell zone. High probability setup.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral Silver Bullet - No Fair Value Gaps detected. No institutional imbalances. Wait for Silver Bullet sessions and FVG formation.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate ICT Silver Bullet signals. Check data quality and timestamp availability.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 50 bars for FVG detection. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Asfx A2 Vwap
blocks.description: ASFX A2 VWAP - Proprietary signal combining VWAP deviation with momentum filters. Detects institutional order flow bias relative to VWAP. Used to align trade direction with institutional activity.

signals.name: ABOVE_VWAP
signals.description: Above VWAP - Price trading above institutional average. Bullish context. Longs favorable. Institutional buying zone. VWAP acts as support.

signals.name: BELOW_VWAP
signals.description: Below VWAP - Price trading below institutional average. Bearish context. Shorts favorable. Institutional selling zone. VWAP acts as resistance.

signals.name: AT_VWAP
signals.description: At VWAP - Price testing institutional average (within 0.5%). Key decision level. Watch for bounce or rejection. High-quality entry zone. Tight stops possible.

signals.name: VWAP_CROSS_UP
signals.description: VWAP cross above - Price crossed above institutional average. Bullish momentum. Enter longs. Institutional buying inflection. Strong continuation signal.

signals.name: VWAP_CROSS_DOWN
signals.description: VWAP cross below - Price crossed below institutional average. Bearish momentum. Enter shorts. Institutional selling inflection. Strong reversal signal.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish VWAP - Above VWAP or crossed up. Institutional buyers active. Long positions favorable. VWAP supporting price.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish VWAP - Below VWAP or crossed down. Institutional sellers active. Short positions favorable. VWAP resisting price.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral VWAP - At VWAP equilibrium. No directional bias. Wait for cross or rejection. Key decision level forming.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate VWAP. Check data quality, volume data, and timestamp availability.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need enough bars for VWAP calculation. Wait for more price history with volume.

blocks.name: Adaptive Momentum Oscillator
blocks.description: Adaptive Momentum Oscillator - Dynamic oscillator that adjusts sensitivity to current volatility regime. Identifies overbought/oversold conditions more accurately in ranging and trending markets. Directionally neutral composite signal.

signals.name: BEARISH_CROSS
signals.description: Bearish momentum cross - Adaptive momentum crossed below signal line. Downside momentum building. Enter shorts or take profit on longs. Adaptive smoothing reduces false signals.

signals.name: BEARISH_DIVERGENCE
signals.description: Bearish momentum divergence - Price making higher highs but momentum making lower highs. Uptrend losing strength. Reversal warning. Take profit on longs. Prepare shorts.

signals.name: BULLISH_CROSS
signals.description: Bullish momentum cross - Adaptive momentum crossed above signal line. Upside momentum building. Enter longs or take profit on shorts. Adaptive smoothing reduces false signals.

signals.name: BULLISH_DIVERGENCE
signals.description: Bullish momentum divergence - Price making lower lows but momentum making higher lows. Downtrend losing strength. Reversal warning. Take profit on shorts. Prepare longs.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish momentum - Adaptive momentum showing upside. Cross or divergence detected. Long positions favorable. Momentum confirming uptrend.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish momentum - Adaptive momentum showing downside. Cross or divergence detected. Short positions favorable. Momentum confirming downtrend.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral momentum - No significant momentum signals. No crosses or divergences detected. Wait for clearer momentum direction.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate adaptive momentum oscillator. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need enough bars for momentum calculation. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Macd Price Forecasting
blocks.description: MACD Price Forecasting - Uses MACD divergence and histogram patterns to forecast short-term price direction. Combines momentum and trend signals for predictive entries. Neutral until directional bias confirmed by histogram.

signals.name: BEARISH_FORECAST
signals.description: Bearish MACD forecast - MACD prediction shows bearish trend. Downside momentum forecasted. Enter shorts or take profit on longs. Machine learning price prediction bearish.

signals.name: BULLISH_FORECAST
signals.description: Bullish MACD forecast - MACD prediction shows bullish trend. Upside momentum forecasted. Enter longs or take profit on shorts. Machine learning price prediction bullish.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish MACD - MACD forecast shows upside. Momentum prediction bullish. Long positions favorable. ML-predicted uptrend.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish MACD - MACD forecast shows downside. Momentum prediction bearish. Short positions favorable. ML-predicted downtrend.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral MACD - No clear MACD forecast direction. No momentum prediction. Wait for clearer signals.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate MACD forecasting. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need enough bars for MACD calculation and forecasting. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Supply Demand Zones
blocks.description: Supply and Demand Zones - Identifies fresh supply (unfilled sell orders) and demand (unfilled buy orders) zones using strong impulsive moves. Bullish at demand zones, bearish at supply zones. Core levels for smart money strategies.

signals.name: DEMAND_ZONE
signals.description: Inside demand zone - Price at institutional buying level. Strong support. Enter longs. Volume accumulation zone. Expect bounce. Stop below zone.

signals.name: SUPPLY_ZONE
signals.description: Inside supply zone - Price at institutional selling level. Strong resistance. Enter shorts. Distribution zone. Expect rejection. Stop above zone.

signals.name: NEAR_DEMAND
signals.description: Near demand zone - Approaching institutional support. Prepare long entries. Watch for bounce. Set alerts. Zone within 5% of price.

signals.name: NEAR_SUPPLY
signals.description: Near supply zone - Approaching institutional resistance. Prepare short entries. Watch for rejection. Set alerts. Zone within 5% of price.

signals.name: NO_ZONE
signals.description: No zone detected - Price far from supply/demand zones. No institutional footprint. Wait for next zone. Avoid random entries.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish supply/demand - At demand zone. Institutional buyers present. Long positions favorable. Support established.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish supply/demand - At supply zone. Institutional sellers present. Short positions favorable. Resistance established.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral supply/demand - Between zones. No institutional presence. Wait for zone approach before trading.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate supply/demand zones. Check data quality and volume data availability.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 50 candles for supply/demand zone identification. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Adx
blocks.description: ADX (Average Directional Index) - Measures trend strength without direction. High ADX confirms strong trend; low ADX indicates ranging market. Neutral signal used to filter trend-following blocks from counter-trend blocks.

signals.name: WEAK_UPTREND
signals.description: Weak uptrend - ADX <25, +DI > -DI. Emerging bullish bias but not strong. Not tradeable yet. Wait for ADX to strengthen above 25.

signals.name: MODERATE_UPTREND
signals.description: Moderate uptrend - ADX 25-50, +DI > -DI. Tradeable bullish trend. Enter longs. Good trend strength. Follow trend strategies.

signals.name: STRONG_UPTREND
signals.description: Strong uptrend - ADX 50-75, +DI > -DI. Powerful bullish trend. Stay in longs aggressively. Optimal for trend-following. High conviction.

signals.name: VERY_STRONG_UPTREND
signals.description: Very strong uptrend - ADX >75, +DI > -DI. Exceptional bullish momentum. Maximum position size. Ride trend. Rare powerful move.

signals.name: WEAK_DOWNTREND
signals.description: Weak downtrend - ADX <25, -DI > +DI. Emerging bearish bias but not strong. Not tradeable yet. Wait for ADX to strengthen above 25.

signals.name: MODERATE_DOWNTREND
signals.description: Moderate downtrend - ADX 25-50, -DI > +DI. Tradeable bearish trend. Enter shorts. Good trend strength. Follow trend strategies.

signals.name: STRONG_DOWNTREND
signals.description: Strong downtrend - ADX 50-75, -DI > +DI. Powerful bearish trend. Stay in shorts aggressively. Optimal for trend-following. High conviction.

signals.name: VERY_STRONG_DOWNTREND
signals.description: Very strong downtrend - ADX >75, -DI > +DI. Exceptional bearish momentum. Maximum position size. Ride trend. Rare powerful move.

signals.name: RANGING
signals.description: Ranging market - ADX <10. No directional trend. Choppy consolidation. Avoid trend strategies. Wait for breakout. Use range-bound trading.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish trend - ADX ≥25, +DI > -DI. Tradeable uptrend confirmed. Long positions favorable. Trend strength sufficient for entries.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish trend - ADX ≥25, -DI > +DI. Tradeable downtrend confirmed. Short positions favorable. Trend strength sufficient for entries.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral/weak trend - ADX <25. No strong directional trend. Ranging or consolidating. Avoid trend trades until ADX strengthens.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate ADX. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least (period × 2) candles for ADX calculation. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Ichimoku Cloud
blocks.description: Ichimoku Cloud - Multi-component trend system detecting price position relative to cloud, Tenkan/Kijun crosses, and Chikou confirmation. Bullish above cloud, bearish below. Comprehensive trend and momentum indicator.

signals.name: ABOVE_CLOUD
signals.description: Above Ichimoku cloud - Price above kumo. Strong bullish signal. Trend confirmed. Enter/hold longs. Cloud acts as support. Green cloud ideal.

signals.name: BELOW_CLOUD
signals.description: Below Ichimoku cloud - Price below kumo. Strong bearish signal. Downtrend confirmed. Enter/hold shorts. Cloud acts as resistance. Red cloud ideal.

signals.name: IN_CLOUD
signals.description: Inside Ichimoku cloud - Price in kumo. Neutral/consolidation. No clear trend. Wait for breakout above or breakdown below cloud. Choppy conditions.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish Ichimoku - Price above cloud. Uptrend confirmed by all Ichimoku components. Long positions favorable. Cloud support below.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish Ichimoku - Price below cloud. Downtrend confirmed by all Ichimoku components. Short positions favorable. Cloud resistance above.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral Ichimoku - Price in cloud. Consolidation phase. No clear directional bias. Wait for cloud breakout before trading.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate Ichimoku Cloud. Check data quality and minimum bars requirement.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least (senkou_period + 10) candles for Ichimoku calculation. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Wyckoff Reaccumulation
blocks.description: Wyckoff Reaccumulation - Detects Wyckoff re-accumulation (mid-trend consolidation before further upside). Bullish continuation signal identifying when institutions are adding to long positions during a trend pause.

signals.name: BREAKOUT_CONTINUATION
signals.description: Breakout continuation - Price breaks above consolidation range with high volume. Re-accumulation complete. Uptrend resumes. Add to longs. Trail stops. Strong continuation signal.

signals.name: REACCUMULATION_DETECTED
signals.description: Re-accumulation detected - Consolidation within uptrend. Smart money adding positions. Range building. Hold longs. Wait for Spring or Breakout before adding.

signals.name: SPRING_DETECTED
signals.description: Spring detected - False breakdown in uptrend consolidation. Weak hands shaken out. Quick recovery. Major continuation signal. Add to longs aggressively. Stop below spring low.

signals.name: NO_REACCUMULATION
signals.description: No re-accumulation - Either not in uptrend or not consolidating. No mid-trend accumulation pattern. Use trend following strategies instead.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish Wyckoff - Re-accumulation, Spring, or Breakout detected. Uptrend continuation highly probable. Long positions favorable. Major upside continuation.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish Wyckoff - Re-accumulation failure or distribution detected. Uptrend in doubt. Exit longs. Consider shorts.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral Wyckoff - No clear re-accumulation pattern. Either trending or unclear consolidation. Wait for clearer signals.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate Wyckoff re-accumulation. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 50+ candles for Wyckoff re-accumulation analysis. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Wyckoff Distribution
blocks.description: Wyckoff Distribution - Detects Wyckoff distribution phases: BC, UT, and LPSY patterns indicating institutional selling. Bearish setup for entering shorts after distribution is confirmed. Best for longer timeframe swing strategies.

signals.name: SOW_BREAKDOWN
signals.description: Sign of Weakness breakdown (Phase D) - Smart money selling. Price breaks below support with high volume. Distribution complete. Enter shorts aggressively. Markdown phase begins.

signals.name: UTAD_DETECTED
signals.description: UTAD detected (Phase C) - Upthrust After Distribution. False breakout above resistance. Retail trapped long. Quick reversal. Major shorting opportunity. Stop above UTAD high.

signals.name: DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_A
signals.description: Distribution Phase A - Buying climax. High volume euphoria at top. Reversal beginning. Smart money distributing to retail. Early distribution. Monitor for Phase B.

signals.name: DISTRIBUTION_PHASE_B
signals.description: Distribution Phase B - Range building at top. Quiet consolidation. Smart money distributing. Volume declining on rallies. Wait for UTAD (Phase C) or SOW (Phase D) before shorting.

signals.name: NO_DISTRIBUTION
signals.description: No distribution - Price trending. Not consolidating at top. No Wyckoff distribution patterns. Use trend strategies instead. No topping pattern.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish Wyckoff - No distribution detected. Market trending upward. Long positions favorable. Not at distributional top.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish Wyckoff - UTAD or SOW detected. Smart money distribution confirmed. Short positions highly favorable. Major downside potential.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral Wyckoff - In Phase B consolidation or no pattern. Wait for UTAD/SOW signals before trading. Patient observation phase.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate Wyckoff distribution. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 50+ candles for Wyckoff analysis. Wait for more price history.

blocks.name: Wyckoff Accumulation
blocks.description: Wyckoff Accumulation - Detects classic Wyckoff accumulation phases: PS, SC, AR, and Spring patterns indicating institutional buying. Bullish setup for entering longs after accumulation is confirmed. Best for longer timeframe swing strategies.

signals.name: SOS_BREAKOUT
signals.description: Sign of Strength breakout (Phase D) - Smart money buying. Price breaks above resistance with high volume. Accumulation complete. Enter longs aggressively. Markup phase begins.

signals.name: SPRING_DETECTED
signals.description: Spring detected (Phase C) - False breakdown below support. Weak hands shaken out. Quick recovery. Major buying opportunity. Enter longs. Stop below spring low.

signals.name: ACCUMULATION_PHASE_A
signals.description: Accumulation Phase A - Selling climax. High volume panic. Reversal beginning. Smart money absorbing supply. Early accumulation. Monitor for Phase B.

signals.name: ACCUMULATION_PHASE_B
signals.description: Accumulation Phase B - Range building. Quiet consolidation. Smart money accumulating. Volume declining. Wait for Spring (Phase C) or SOS (Phase D) before entering.

signals.name: NO_ACCUMULATION
signals.description: No accumulation - Price trending. Not consolidating. No Wyckoff patterns detected. Use trend strategies instead. No accumulation opportunity.

signals.name: BULLISH
signals.description: Bullish Wyckoff - Spring or SOS detected. Smart money accumulation confirmed. Long positions highly favorable. Major upside potential.

signals.name: BEARISH
signals.description: Bearish Wyckoff - Distribution patterns detected. Smart money distributing. Short positions favorable. Downside risk present.

signals.name: NEUTRAL
signals.description: Neutral Wyckoff - In Phase B consolidation or no pattern. Wait for Spring/SOS signals before trading. Patient accumulation phase.

signals.name: ERROR
signals.description: Analysis error - Cannot calculate Wyckoff accumulation. Check data quality and required columns.

signals.name: INSUFFICIENT_DATA
signals.description: Insufficient data - Need at least 50+ candles for Wyckoff analysis. Wait for more price history.
